---
title: "CYLCE21_2mm_motile"
author: "Nicole Pittoors"
date: "2025-09-10"
output: html_document
---
Set working directory, create output directory
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "Path/to/folder")

# Also set working directory for interactive use
setwd("ath/to/folder")

# Set output directory
output_dir <- "./Output_2mm"

# Create the directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Verify it was created
cat("Output directory set to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("Full path:", normalizePath(output_dir), "\n")
```

Load libraries
```{r load libraries}
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(viridis)
library(tibble)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(gridExtra)
library(ape)
library(cowplot)
library(tibble)
```

Load data
```{r load data}
# Taxonomy table with IDs for each voucher specimen 'individualCount'
taxa_2mm <- read.csv("Motile_2mm_taxonomy_table_FINAL.csv", row.names = 1)
metadata_2mm <-read.csv("CYCLE_ARMS_2mm_Motile_Metadata.csv", row.names = 1)
```


Create four count tables at the taxonomic levels of:
Phylum
Order
Family
ScientificName (lowest possible classification)
If lower classification is not available, symbold denote the lowest mapping available:
_! = Class
_# = Order
_^ = Family
_* = Genus
```{r create count tables}

# Check data structure
cat("Data dimensions:", dim(taxa_2mm), "\n")
cat("Unique ARMS:", length(unique(taxa_2mm$arms_id_r)), "\n")
cat("Total individuals:", sum(taxa_2mm$individualCount), "\n")

# =========== 1. PHYLUM-LEVEL COUNT TABLE ==========

# Aggregate by arms_id_r and phylum, sum individual counts
phylum_counts <- taxa_2mm %>%
  # Remove NA phyla if any
  filter(!is.na(phylum) & phylum != "") %>%
  # Group and sum counts
  group_by(arms_id_r, phylum) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = sum(individualCount, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  # Pivot to wide format: arms_id_r as rows, phyla as columns
  pivot_wider(names_from = phylum, 
              values_from = count, 
              values_fill = 0) %>%
  # Convert to data frame with arms_id_r as row names
  column_to_rownames("arms_id_r")

cat("\nPhylum table dimensions:", dim(phylum_counts), "\n")
cat("Phyla found:", colnames(phylum_counts), "\n")

# ========= # 2. ORDER-LEVEL COUNT TABLE  =============

order_counts <- taxa_2mm %>%
  # Remove NA orders if any
  filter(!is.na(order) & order != "") %>%
  # Group and sum counts
  group_by(arms_id_r, order) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = sum(individualCount, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  # Pivot to wide format
  pivot_wider(names_from = order, 
              values_from = count, 
              values_fill = 0) %>%
  # Convert to data frame with arms_id_r as row names
  column_to_rownames("arms_id_r")

cat("\nOrder table dimensions:", dim(order_counts), "\n")
cat("Orders found:", length(colnames(order_counts)), "orders\n")

# =========== 3. FAMILY-LEVEL COUNT TABLE ============

family_counts <- taxa_2mm %>%
  # Remove NA families if any
  filter(!is.na(family) & family != "") %>%
  # Group and sum counts
  group_by(arms_id_r, family) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = sum(individualCount, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  # Pivot to wide format
  pivot_wider(names_from = family, 
              values_from = count, 
              values_fill = 0) %>%
  # Convert to data frame with arms_id_r as row names
  column_to_rownames("arms_id_r")

cat("\nFamily table dimensions:", dim(family_counts), "\n")
cat("Families found:", length(colnames(family_counts)), "families\n")

# ============ 4. SCIENTIFIC NAME (SPECIES) COUNT TABLE ==============

species_counts <- taxa_2mm %>%
  # Remove NA scientific names if any
  filter(!is.na(scientificName) & scientificName != "") %>%
  # Group and sum counts
  group_by(arms_id_r, scientificName) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = sum(individualCount, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  # Pivot to wide format
  pivot_wider(names_from = scientificName, 
              values_from = count, 
              values_fill = 0) %>%
  # Convert to data frame with arms_id_r as row names
  column_to_rownames("arms_id_r")

cat("\nSpecies table dimensions:", dim(species_counts), "\n")
cat("Species/morphospecies found:", length(colnames(species_counts)), "taxa\n")

# ============ 5. QUALITY CHECKS ==========

# Check total counts are preserved
original_total <- sum(taxa_2mm$individualCount)
phylum_total <- sum(phylum_counts)
order_total <- sum(order_counts) 
family_total <- sum(family_counts)
species_total <- sum(species_counts)

cat("Original total individuals:", original_total, "\n")
cat("Phylum table total:", phylum_total, "\n")
cat("Order table total:", order_total, "\n") 
cat("Family table total:", family_total, "\n")
cat("Species table total:", species_total, "\n")

# Check for missing data at each level
cat("\nMissing data check:\n")
cat("Rows with missing phylum:", sum(is.na(taxa_2mm$phylum) | taxa_2mm$phylum == ""), "\n")
cat("Rows with missing order:", sum(is.na(taxa_2mm$order) | taxa_2mm$order == ""), "\n")
cat("Rows with missing family:", sum(is.na(taxa_2mm$family) | taxa_2mm$family == ""), "\n")
cat("Rows with missing scientificName:", sum(is.na(taxa_2mm$scientificName) | taxa_2mm$scientificName == ""), "\n")

# Show example of each table
cat("\n=== EXAMPLE OUTPUTS ===\n")

cat("\nPhylum table (first 5 rows, 5 columns):\n")
print(phylum_counts[1:min(5, nrow(phylum_counts)), 1:min(5, ncol(phylum_counts))])

cat("\nOrder table (first 3 rows, 5 columns):\n")
print(order_counts[1:min(3, nrow(order_counts)), 1:min(5, ncol(order_counts))])

cat("\nFamily table (first 3 rows, 5 columns):\n")
print(family_counts[1:min(3, nrow(family_counts)), 1:min(5, ncol(family_counts))])

cat("\nSpecies table (first 3 rows, 5 columns):\n")
print(species_counts[1:min(3, nrow(species_counts)), 1:min(5, ncol(species_counts))])

# =========== 6. SAVE RESULTS ============

# Uncomment to save to CSV files
write.csv(phylum_counts, "motile_phylum_counts.csv")
write.csv(order_counts, "motile_order_counts.csv") 
write.csv(family_counts, "motile_family_counts.csv")
write.csv(species_counts, "motile_species_counts.csv")

save(phylum_counts,order_counts,family_counts,species_counts, file = "taxa_count_tables_2mm_mot.RData")
```

# Export .CSV of mapped unique families
```{r}
tax_subset_2mm <- taxa_2mm[, c("phylum", "class", "order", "family")]
unique_families_2mm <- unique(tax_subset_2mm)

# Remove any rows where Family is NA
unique_families_2mm <- unique_families_2mm[order(unique_families_2mm$phylum, 
                                          unique_families_2mm$class,
                                          unique_families_2mm$order,
                                          unique_families_2mm$family), ]


unique_families_clean_2mm <- unique_families_2mm[!grepl("[^[:alnum:]]$", unique_families_2mm$family), ]

# Remove taxonomic errors
unique_families_metazoa_only_2mm <- unique_families_clean_2mm[
  !unique_families_clean_2mm$family %in% taxonomic_errors, ]

write.csv(unique_families_metazoa_only_2mm, 
          file = "./unique_families_2mm_clean.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)
```

Set plotting details
```{r set plot colors}
# Renamed sites for easier reading. Within deep sites, we had ARMS deployed within corals and then a triplicate 10-20m in a background area away from corals to see if there was a difference in community composition, and to also ensure we were capturing habitat variability within a site. There was not a significant difference so we will now call "coral" localities deep 1 and "background" deep2.  

# Use to plot sites east to west
ordered_sites_WE <- c("Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_deep", "EFGB_shallow", 
                  "Bright_shallow", "Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2",
                  "McGrail_deep", "Alderdice_deep1", "Alderdice_deep2",
                  "Alderdice_shallow", "Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")

# Use to plot sites by increasing turbidity
turb_ordered_sites <- c("McGrail_deep","EFGB_shallow", "Alderdice_shallow", 
                        "Bright_shallow", "Diaphus_deep2", "EFGB_deep", 
                        "Diaphus_deep1", "Bright_deep2", "Bright_deep1", 
                        "Alderdice_deep1", "Stetson_shallow", "Alderdice_deep2")


# Colors for unique sitelocality
site_colors_2mm <- c(
  "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E",
  "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C",
  "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30",
  "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
  "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E",
  "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E",
  "McGrail_deep" = "#015951",
  "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3",
  "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
  "Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077",
  "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599",
  "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599")

# Phylumm color mapping that matches metabarcoding and CoralNet data
# Unique motile 2mm voucher phyla:
 # "Annelida", "Arthropoda", "Echinodermata","Mollusca", "Brachiopoda", "Nemertea", "Chordata", "Platyhelminthes"

phylum_colors_2mm <- c(
  "Annelida" = "#60714E", 
  "Arthropoda" = "#3B8C6E",
  "Brachiopoda" = "#9DC9D3",
  "Chordata" = "#408BA8",
  "Echinodermata" = "#A8B1D6",
  "Mollusca" = "#F69B9C",
  "Nemertea" = "#C74238",
  "Platyhelminthes" = "#FEBC2C"
)
```


# Abundance plot of mean % cover across all plates within an ARMS unit by ARMS UNIT
```{r Rel. Aubdance Plot}
# Motile 2mm Phylum Relative Abundance Plots

# =========== CONVERT COUNT DATA TO RELATIVE ABUNDANCES =============

# Calculate relative abundances (proportions) for each ARMS unit
motile_2mm_relative <- phylum_counts %>%
  # Convert to proportions within each sample (row)
  apply(1, function(x) x / sum(x)) %>%
  # Transpose back to samples as rows
  t() %>%
  # Convert to data frame
  as.data.frame()

# Check the conversion
cat("Original count data dimensions:", dim(phylum_counts), "\n")
cat("Relative abundance data dimensions:", dim(motile_2mm_relative), "\n")
cat("Row sums (should all be 1.0):", head(rowSums(motile_2mm_relative)), "\n")

# ========== 2. MATCH WITH METADATA AND PRESERVE ORDER =============

# Get common ARMS between count data and metadata
common_arms_2mm <- intersect(rownames(motile_2mm_relative), rownames(metadata_2mm))
cat("Common ARMS_IDs between count data and metadata:", length(common_arms_2mm), "\n")

# Subset to common samples, preserving metadata order
metadata_2mm_ordered <- metadata_2mm[common_arms_2mm, ]
motile_2mm_relative_ordered <- motile_2mm_relative[common_arms_2mm, ]

# Create site2_ID using the original metadata order
metadata_2mm_ordered$site2_ID <- paste0(sprintf("%02d", 1:nrow(metadata_2mm_ordered)), "_", metadata_2mm_ordered$sitelocality)

cat("Final dataset:", nrow(metadata_2mm_ordered), "ARMS samples\n")
cat("Phyla in data:", colnames(motile_2mm_relative_ordered), "\n")

# =========== 3. PREPARE PLOT DATA =============

# Create abundance plot data for motile 2mm
abundance_plot_data_2mm <- motile_2mm_relative_ordered %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(ARMS_ID = rownames(.),
         sitelocality = metadata_2mm_ordered$sitelocality,
         site2_ID = metadata_2mm_ordered$site2_ID,
         turbidity_rank = metadata_2mm_ordered$turbidity_std_rank,
         depth = metadata_2mm_ordered$depth) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 1:ncol(motile_2mm_relative_ordered), 
               names_to = "phylum", 
               values_to = "Relative_Abundance") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Relative_Abundance = Relative_Abundance * 100) %>%  # Convert to percentage
  dplyr::filter(Relative_Abundance > 0)  # Remove zero abundances for cleaner plot

# Check the data structure
cat("Plot data dimensions:", dim(abundance_plot_data_2mm), "\n")
cat("Unique phyla in plot:", unique(abundance_plot_data_2mm$phylum), "\n")


# ========== 5. PLOT 1: PRESERVE METADATA ORDER ==========

# Keep the original metadata order
abundance_plot_data_metadata_order <- abundance_plot_data_2mm %>%
  dplyr::mutate(site2_ID = factor(site2_ID, levels = metadata_2mm_ordered$site2_ID))

# Create abundance plot preserving metadata order
p_abundance_metadata_order <- ggplot(abundance_plot_data_metadata_order, 
                                    aes(x = site2_ID, y = Relative_Abundance, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phylum_colors_2mm, name = "Phylum", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(y = "Relative Abundance (%)", 
       x = "ARMS Unit (metadata order)", 
       title = "Motile 2mm Phylum Community Composition",
       subtitle = paste("All", nrow(metadata_2mm_ordered), "ARMS samples in metadata order")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  )

# Display the plot
print(p_abundance_metadata_order)

# =========== 6. PLOT 2: ORDER BY TURBIDITY ===========

# Order sites by turbidity (clear to turbid)
site_turbidity_order_2mm <- metadata_2mm_ordered %>%
  dplyr::arrange(turbidity_std_rank) %>%  # Clear water (low rank) to turbid (high rank)
  pull(site2_ID)

abundance_plot_data_turbidity_order <- abundance_plot_data_2mm %>%
  dplyr::mutate(site2_ID = factor(site2_ID, levels = site_turbidity_order_2mm))

# Create abundance plot ordered by turbidity
p_abundance_turbidity_2mm <- ggplot(abundance_plot_data_turbidity_order, 
                                   aes(x = site2_ID, y = Relative_Abundance, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phylum_colors_2mm, name = "Phylum", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(y = "Relative Abundance (%)", 
       x = "ARMS Unit (ordered by turbidity: clear → turbid)", 
       title = "Motile 2mm Phylum Community Composition",
       subtitle = paste("All", nrow(metadata_2mm_ordered), "ARMS samples ordered by increasing turbidity rank")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  )

# Display the plot
print(p_abundance_turbidity_2mm)

# =========== 7. PLOT 3: ORDER BY DEPTH =============

# Order sites by depth (shallow to deep)
site_depth_order_2mm <- metadata_2mm_ordered %>%
  dplyr::arrange(depth) %>%  # Shallow to deep
  pull(site2_ID)

abundance_plot_data_depth_order <- abundance_plot_data_2mm %>%
  dplyr::mutate(site2_ID = factor(site2_ID, levels = site_depth_order_2mm))

# Create abundance plot ordered by depth
p_abundance_depth_2mm <- ggplot(abundance_plot_data_depth_order, 
                               aes(x = site2_ID, y = Relative_Abundance, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phylum_colors_2mm, name = "Phylum", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(y = "Relative Abundance (%)", 
       x = "ARMS Unit (ordered by depth: shallow → deep)", 
       title = "Motile 2mm Phylum Community Composition",
       subtitle = paste("All", nrow(metadata_2mm_ordered), "ARMS samples ordered by increasing depth")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  )

# Display the plot
print(p_abundance_depth_2mm)

# ============= 8. PLOT 4: ORDER BY SITE TYPE (GROUP SIMILAR SITES) ===========

# Order by site type for better comparison
site_type_order_2mm <- metadata_2mm_ordered %>%
  dplyr::arrange(sitelocality) %>%  # Alphabetical by site locality
  pull(site2_ID)

abundance_plot_data_site_order <- abundance_plot_data_2mm %>%
  dplyr::mutate(site2_ID = factor(site2_ID, levels = site_type_order_2mm))

# Create abundance plot ordered by site type
p_abundance_site_2mm <- ggplot(abundance_plot_data_site_order, 
                              aes(x = site2_ID, y = Relative_Abundance, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phylum_colors_2mm, name = "Phylum", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(y = "Relative Abundance (%)", 
       x = "ARMS Unit (grouped by site locality)", 
       title = "Motile 2mm Phylum Community Composition",
       subtitle = paste("All", nrow(metadata_2mm_ordered), "ARMS samples grouped by site locality")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  )

# Display the plot
print(p_abundance_site_2mm)

# =========== 9. SAVE PLOTS =========
# Save all plots
ggsave(file.path(output_dir_2mm, "Motile_2mm_Phylum_Metadata_Order.pdf"), 
       plot = p_abundance_metadata_order, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)

ggsave(file.path(output_dir_2mm, "Motile_2mm_Phylum_Turbidity_Order.pdf"), 
       plot = p_abundance_turbidity_2mm, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)

ggsave(file.path(output_dir_2mm, "Motile_2mm_Phylum_Depth_Order.pdf"), 
       plot = p_abundance_depth_2mm, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)

ggsave(file.path(output_dir_2mm, "Motile_2mm_Phylum_Site_Order.pdf"), 
       plot = p_abundance_site_2mm, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# ============== 10. SUMMARY STATISTICS ============

cat("\n=== SUMMARY STATISTICS ===\n")
cat("Total ARMS samples:", nrow(metadata_2mm_ordered), "\n")
cat("Total phyla:", ncol(motile_2mm_relative_ordered), "\n")
cat("Phyla present:", paste(colnames(motile_2mm_relative_ordered), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Calculate phylum prevalence (how many samples each phylum appears in)
phylum_prevalence <- colSums(phylum_counts > 0)
cat("\nPhylum prevalence (# of ARMS with each phylum):\n")
for (phylum in names(phylum_prevalence)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-15s: %2d/%d samples (%.1f%%)\n", 
              phylum, phylum_prevalence[phylum], nrow(phylum_counts),
              100 * phylum_prevalence[phylum] / nrow(phylum_counts)))
}

# Calculate mean relative abundance per phylum
mean_rel_abundance <- colMeans(motile_2mm_relative_ordered) * 100
cat("\nMean relative abundance per phylum:\n")
for (phylum in names(sort(mean_rel_abundance, decreasing = TRUE))) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-15s: %.1f%%\n", phylum, mean_rel_abundance[phylum]))
}
```

Plot relative abundance for each site locality
Plotted in increasing turbidity order
```{r plot rel abund by SITE}
# Motile 2mm Site-Aggregated Abundance Plot
# Handle package conflicts
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::summarise)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::mutate)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select)

# ============== STEP 1: VERIFY AND PREPARE INPUT DATA ==============

cat("motile_2mm_relative_ordered dimensions:", dim(motile_2mm_relative_ordered), "\n")
cat("metadata_2mm_ordered dimensions:", dim(metadata_2mm_ordered), "\n")

# Check row sums of relative abundance data
row_sums <- rowSums(motile_2mm_relative_ordered, na.rm = TRUE)
cat("Row sums range:", range(row_sums), "\n")

# Ensure proper relative abundances (normalize if needed)
if (any(abs(row_sums - 1.0) > 0.01)) {
  cat("Normalizing relative abundances...\n")
  motile_relative_clean <- motile_2mm_relative_ordered / rowSums(motile_2mm_relative_ordered)
} else {
  cat("Relative abundances are properly normalized\n")
  motile_relative_clean <- motile_2mm_relative_ordered
}

# ============ STEP 2: CLEAN METADATA AND CHECK FOR STETSON ==========

cat("\n=== CHECKING METADATA ===\n")

# Check for Stetson sites
stetson_check <- grep("Stetson", metadata_2mm_ordered$sitelocality, value = TRUE)
cat("Stetson sites in metadata:", stetson_check, "\n")

# Check for any remaining NA values in sitelocality
na_sites <- sum(is.na(metadata_2mm_ordered$sitelocality))
cat("NA values in sitelocality:", na_sites, "\n")

# Show unique sitelocality values
cat("Unique sitelocalities in metadata:\n")
print(sort(unique(metadata_2mm_ordered$sitelocality)))

# ========== STEP 3: CREATE CLEAN COMBINED DATASET ============

# Get matching ARMS between abundance and metadata
common_arms <- intersect(rownames(motile_relative_clean), rownames(metadata_2mm_ordered))
cat("Common ARMS between abundance and metadata:", length(common_arms), "\n")

motile_combined_clean <- motile_2mm_relative_ordered %>%
  rownames_to_column("ARMS_ID") %>%
  left_join(
    metadata_2mm %>%
      rownames_to_column("ARMS_ID") %>%
      dplyr::select(ARMS_ID, sitelocality, turbidity_std_rank, depth),
    by = "ARMS_ID"
  ) %>%  # ADD THIS PIPE!
  # CRITICAL: Remove any rows with missing sitelocality
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(sitelocality) & sitelocality != "" & sitelocality != "NA")

cat("Combined dataset dimensions:", dim(motile_combined_clean), "\n")
cat("Unique sites in combined data:", length(unique(motile_combined_clean$sitelocality)), "\n")

# Check if we lost any data
if (nrow(motile_combined_clean) != length(common_arms)) {
  lost_arms <- length(common_arms) - nrow(motile_combined_clean)
  cat("WARNING: Lost", lost_arms, "ARMS due to missing sitelocality\n")
}

# ============= STEP 4: AGGREGATE BY SITE ============

cat("\n=== AGGREGATING BY SITE ===\n")

# Get phylum column names (exclude metadata columns)
phylum_columns <- colnames(motile_combined_clean)[
  !colnames(motile_combined_clean) %in% c("ARMS_ID", "sitelocality", "turbidity_std_rank", "depth")
]
cat("Phylum columns:", paste(phylum_columns, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Aggregate by sitelocality
site_aggregated_clean <- motile_combined_clean %>%
  dplyr::select(-ARMS_ID) %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    # Mean relative abundance for each phylum
    across(all_of(phylum_columns), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    # Environmental context
    mean_turbidity = mean(turbidity_std_rank, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_depth = mean(depth, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_arms = n(),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

cat("Site aggregated dimensions:", dim(site_aggregated_clean), "\n")
cat("Sites in aggregated data:\n")
print(site_aggregated_clean$sitelocality)

# Verify relative abundances sum to ~1.0 for each site
site_totals <- rowSums(site_aggregated_clean[, phylum_columns])
cat("Site-level abundance totals (should be ~1.0):\n")
print(round(site_totals, 3))

# ============= STEP 5: CONVERT TO LONG FORMAT ===========
site_long_clean <- site_aggregated_clean %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(phylum_columns),
    names_to = "phylum",
    values_to = "relative_abundance"
  ) %>%
  # Convert to percentage
  dplyr::mutate(relative_abundance_pct = relative_abundance * 100) %>%
  # Keep only non-zero values for cleaner plotting
  filter(relative_abundance_pct > 0)

cat("Long format dimensions:", dim(site_long_clean), "\n")

# =========== STEP 6: APPLY SITE ORDERING =============
# Check which sites from your order are actually in the data
sites_in_data <- unique(site_long_clean$sitelocality)
sites_to_plot <- intersect(turb_ordered_sites, sites_in_data)
extra_sites <- setdiff(sites_in_data, turb_ordered_sites)

cat("Sites in data:", paste(sort(sites_in_data), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Sites to plot (in order):", paste(sites_to_plot, collapse = ", "), "\n")

if (length(extra_sites) > 0) {
  cat("WARNING: Sites in data but not in predefined order:", paste(extra_sites, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  # Add extra sites to the end of the order
  final_site_order <- c(sites_to_plot, extra_sites)
} else {
  final_site_order <- sites_to_plot
}

# Apply factor ordering
site_long_clean$sitelocality <- factor(site_long_clean$sitelocality, levels = final_site_order)

# Remove any remaining NA factor levels
site_long_clean <- site_long_clean %>% filter(!is.na(sitelocality))

cat("Final sites for plotting:", paste(levels(site_long_clean$sitelocality), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# =========== STEP 7: CREATE COLORS AND PLOT ===========
# Create the plot
p_motile_site <- ggplot(site_long_clean, 
                             aes(x = sitelocality, y = relative_abundance_pct, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", 
           color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, width = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phylum_colors_2mm, name = "Phylum", drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(
    y = "Relative Abundance (%)", 
    x = "Site Locality (ordered by turbidity: clear → turbid)", 
    title = "Motile 2mm Phylum Community by Site",
    subtitle = "Mean relative abundance aggregated by site locality"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 12, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 17, color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "cm")
  )

# Display the plot
print(p_motile_site)

# ======= STEP 9: SAVE PLOT =======
ggsave(file.path(output_dir,"Motile_2mm_RelAbund_Sites.pdf"), 
       plot = p_motile_site_clean, width = 6.8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```


#------------------- Alpha Diversity -------------------
Calculate richness and evenness, create violin plot by site and then compare
richness and evenness across turbidity and depth values:
1. Calculate all diversity indices
2. Merge with metadata  
3. Generate both box plots and regression plots
4. Save results to CSV
5. Print summary statistics

Load libraries
```{r load libraries}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(vegan)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidyr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)
```

Calculate diversity indices and creat barplots by sitelocality
```{r calculate and plot div indices}
# ======== 1. CALCULATE DIVERSITY INDICES FROM ORDER COUNT DATA =========

# Calculate richness (number of orders with > 0 counts)
numberOTUs_2mm <- rowSums(order_counts > 0)

# Calculate total abundance per sample
totalAbundance_2mm <- rowSums(order_counts)

# Calculate Shannon diversity (using vegan package)
Shannon_2mm <- diversity(order_counts, index = "shannon", base = 2)

# Calculate Simpson diversity
Simpson_2mm <- diversity(order_counts, index = "simpson")

# Calculate Pielou's evenness
Pielou_2mm <- Shannon_2mm / log(numberOTUs_2mm, base = 2)

# Replace NaN values in Pielou (when numberOTUs = 1 or 0)
Pielou_2mm[is.nan(Pielou_2mm)] <- 0

# Create diversity indices dataframe
div_indices_2mm <- data.frame(
  ARMS_ID = rownames(order_counts),
  totalAbundance = totalAbundance_2mm,
  numberOTUs = numberOTUs_2mm,
  Shannon = Shannon_2mm,
  Simpson = Simpson_2mm,
  Pielou = Pielou_2mm
)

cat("Diversity indices calculated for", nrow(div_indices_2mm), "samples\n")
cat("Order richness range:", range(numberOTUs_2mm), "\n")
cat("Shannon diversity range:", round(range(Shannon_2mm), 3), "\n")

# ========== 2. MERGE WITH METADATA =========

cat("\n=== MERGING WITH METADATA ===\n")

# Merge diversity indices with metadata using ARMS_ID
metadata_2mm_diversity <- cbind(div_indices_2mm, metadata_2mm)

# Check the merge
cat("Diversity data dimensions:", nrow(div_indices_2mm), "x", ncol(div_indices_2mm), "\n")
cat("Metadata dimensions:", nrow(metadata_2mm), "x", ncol(metadata_2mm), "\n")
cat("Merged data dimensions:", nrow(metadata_2mm_diversity), "x", ncol(metadata_2mm_diversity), "\n")

# Display summary statistics
cat("\nSummary of motile 2mm diversity indices:\n")
summary_stats <- metadata_2mm_diversity[, c("numberOTUs", "Shannon", "Simpson", "Pielou")]
print(summary(summary_stats))

# ============ 3. SET UP SITE ORDERING AND COLORS ==============
# Use west to east ordered sites: 'ordered_sites_WE'

# Use site colors: 'site_colors_2mm'

# =============== 4. CUSTOM THEME ==============

custom_theme_2mm <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    # Remove gridlines
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    
    # Add thin black border
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
    
    # Increase text sizes and make all text black
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15, color = "black", face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold"),
    
    # Legend positioning
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

# =========== 5. BOX PLOTS BY SITE =============
# Create long format data for faceted box plot
div_long_2mm <- metadata_2mm_diversity %>%
  dplyr::select(sitelocality, numberOTUs, Pielou) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(numberOTUs, Pielou), 
               names_to = "Metric", 
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Metric = case_when(
    Metric == "numberOTUs" ~ "Order Richness",
    Metric == "Pielou" ~ "Pielou's Evenness"
  ))

# Create box plot for motile 2mm data
diversity_plot_2mm <- ggplot(div_long_2mm, aes(x = factor(sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_WE), y = Value)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = sitelocality), color = "black", alpha = 0.8, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = sitelocality), size = 2, width = 0.3, alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 3, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors_2mm, breaks = ordered_sites_WE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors_2mm, breaks = ordered_sites_WE) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  labs(title = "Motile 2mm Orders: Alpha Diversity by Site", 
       y = "Value", x = "Site", fill = "Site", color = "Site") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = 'black', size = 12, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"  # Remove legend since colors match x-axis
  )

print(diversity_plot_2mm)

# Plot Simpsons and Shannon's indices
div_long_2mm_shansimp <- metadata_2mm_diversity %>%
  dplyr::select(sitelocality, Shannon, Simpson) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Shannon, Simpson), 
               names_to = "Metric", 
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Metric = case_when(
    Metric == "Shannon" ~ "Shannon Diversity",
    Metric == "Simpson" ~ "Simpson Diversity"
  ))

# Create box plot for motile 2mm data - Shannon and Simpson
diversity_plot_2mm_ShanSimp <- ggplot(div_long_2mm_shansimp, aes(x = factor(sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_WE), y = Value)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = sitelocality), color = "black", alpha = 0.8, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = sitelocality), size = 2, width = 0.3, alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 3, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors_2mm, breaks = ordered_sites_WE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors_2mm, breaks = ordered_sites_WE) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  labs(title = "Motile 2mm Orders: Alpha Diversity by Site", 
       y = "Value", x = "Site", fill = "Site", color = "Site") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = 'black', size = 12, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"  # Remove legend since colors match x-axis
  )

print(diversity_plot_2mm_ShanSimp)

# Save plots:
ggsave("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_ShanSimp_diversity_boxplots.pdf", plot = diversity_plot_2mm_ShanSimp, 
       device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 14, units = "in", dpi = 300)
ggsave("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_diversity_boxplots.pdf", plot = diversity_plot_2mm, 
       device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 14, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```


# MOTILE 2MM DESCRIPTIVE ALPHA DIVERSITY ANALYSIS
Focus on patterns and effect sizes rather than hypothesis testing
```{r}
#library(dplyr)
#library(ggplot2)

# ============ 1. ENVIRONMENTAL TERCILE ANALYSIS=============

cat("\n=== ENVIRONMENTAL TERCILE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Create environmental groups: turbidity terciles + ecologically meaningful depth groups
diversity_groups_2mm <- metadata_2mm_diversity %>%
  mutate(
    turb_tercile_2mm = ntile(turbidity_std_rank, 3),
    turb_group_2mm = case_when(
      turb_tercile_2mm == 1 ~ "Clear",
      turb_tercile_2mm == 2 ~ "Intermediate", 
      turb_tercile_2mm == 3 ~ "Turbid"
    ),
    # Ecologically meaningful depth groups based on transition zone
    depth_group_2mm = case_when(
      depth >= 54 & depth <= 66 ~ "Shallow_Mesophotic",
      depth >= 81 & depth <= 85 ~ "Deep_Mesophotic",
      TRUE ~ "Intermediate"  # For any samples outside these ranges
    )
  )

# Descriptive statistics by turbidity terciles
turb_desc_stats_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm %>%
  group_by(turb_group_2mm) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    # Order Richness
    median_richness = median(numberOTUs),
    q25_richness = quantile(numberOTUs, 0.25),
    q75_richness = quantile(numberOTUs, 0.75),
    iqr_richness = IQR(numberOTUs),
    range_richness = paste(min(numberOTUs), "-", max(numberOTUs)),
    # Pielou's Evenness
    median_evenness = round(median(Pielou), 3),
    q25_evenness = round(quantile(Pielou, 0.25), 3),
    q75_evenness = round(quantile(Pielou, 0.75), 3),
    iqr_evenness = round(IQR(Pielou), 3),
    # Environmental ranges
    turb_range = paste(round(min(turbidity_std_rank), 2), "-", round(max(turbidity_std_rank), 2)),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  arrange(factor(turb_group_2mm, levels = c("Clear", "Intermediate", "Turbid")))

cat("TURBIDITY TERCILE PATTERNS:\n")
print(turb_desc_stats_2mm)

# Descriptive statistics by ecologically meaningful depth groups
depth_desc_stats_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm %>%
  filter(depth_group_2mm %in% c("Shallow_Mesophotic", "Deep_Mesophotic")) %>%  # Focus on the two main groups
  group_by(depth_group_2mm) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    # Order Richness
    median_richness = median(numberOTUs),
    q25_richness = quantile(numberOTUs, 0.25),
    q75_richness = quantile(numberOTUs, 0.75),
    iqr_richness = IQR(numberOTUs),
    range_richness = paste(min(numberOTUs), "-", max(numberOTUs)),
    # Pielou's Evenness
    median_evenness = round(median(Pielou), 3),
    q25_evenness = round(quantile(Pielou, 0.25), 3),
    q75_evenness = round(quantile(Pielou, 0.75), 3),
    iqr_evenness = round(IQR(Pielou), 3),
    # Environmental ranges
    depth_range = paste(round(min(depth), 1), "-", round(max(depth), 1), "m"),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  arrange(factor(depth_group_2mm, levels = c("Shallow_Mesophotic", "Deep_Mesophotic")))

cat("\nDEPTH GROUP PATTERNS (Ecologically Meaningful Zones):\n")
print(depth_desc_stats_2mm)

# Check sample distribution
cat("\nSample distribution by depth groups:\n")
depth_distribution_2mm <- table(diversity_groups_2mm$depth_group_2mm)
print(depth_distribution_2mm)

# ============ ROBUST CORRELATION ANALYSIS =================

cat("\n=== ROBUST CORRELATION ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Spearman correlations (robust to non-normality and outliers)
correlations_2mm <- list()

# Richness correlations
correlations_2mm$richness_depth_spear <- cor.test(metadata_2mm_diversity$numberOTUs, 
                                                  metadata_2mm_diversity$depth, 
                                                  method = "spearman")

correlations_2mm$richness_turb_spear <- cor.test(metadata_2mm_diversity$numberOTUs, 
                                                 metadata_2mm_diversity$turbidity_std_rank, 
                                                 method = "spearman")

# Evenness correlations
correlations_2mm$evenness_depth_spear <- cor.test(metadata_2mm_diversity$Pielou, 
                                                  metadata_2mm_diversity$depth, 
                                                  method = "spearman")

correlations_2mm$evenness_turb_spear <- cor.test(metadata_2mm_diversity$Pielou, 
                                                 metadata_2mm_diversity$turbidity_std_rank, 
                                                 method = "spearman")

# Kendall correlations (even more robust for small samples)
correlations_2mm$richness_depth_kendall <- cor.test(metadata_2mm_diversity$numberOTUs, 
                                                    metadata_2mm_diversity$depth, 
                                                    method = "kendall")

correlations_2mm$richness_turb_kendall <- cor.test(metadata_2mm_diversity$numberOTUs, 
                                                   metadata_2mm_diversity$turbidity_std_rank, 
                                                   method = "kendall")

correlations_2mm$evenness_depth_kendall <- cor.test(metadata_2mm_diversity$Pielou, 
                                                    metadata_2mm_diversity$depth, 
                                                    method = "kendall")

correlations_2mm$evenness_turb_kendall <- cor.test(metadata_2mm_diversity$Pielou, 
                                                   metadata_2mm_diversity$turbidity_std_rank, 
                                                   method = "kendall")

# Create correlation summary table
correlation_summary_2mm <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Order_Richness", "Order_Richness", "Pielou_Evenness", "Pielou_Evenness"),
  Environmental_Variable = c("Depth", "Turbidity", "Depth", "Turbidity"),
  Spearman_rho = c(
    round(correlations_2mm$richness_depth_spear$estimate, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$richness_turb_spear$estimate, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$evenness_depth_spear$estimate, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$evenness_turb_spear$estimate, 3)
  ),
  Spearman_p = c(
    round(correlations_2mm$richness_depth_spear$p.value, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$richness_turb_spear$p.value, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$evenness_depth_spear$p.value, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$evenness_turb_spear$p.value, 3)
  ),
  Kendall_tau = c(
    round(correlations_2mm$richness_depth_kendall$estimate, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$richness_turb_kendall$estimate, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$evenness_depth_kendall$estimate, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$evenness_turb_kendall$estimate, 3)
  ),
  Kendall_p = c(
    round(correlations_2mm$richness_depth_kendall$p.value, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$richness_turb_kendall$p.value, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$evenness_depth_kendall$p.value, 3),
    round(correlations_2mm$evenness_turb_kendall$p.value, 3)
  )
)

cat("CORRELATION PATTERNS (focus on effect sizes, not p-values):\n")
print(correlation_summary_2mm)

# ============ 3. EFFECT SIZE ANALYSIS ==============

cat("\n=== EFFECT SIZE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Calculate effect sizes between environmental groups
effect_sizes_2mm <- list()

# Turbidity effect sizes (Clear vs Turbid)
clear_richness_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm$numberOTUs[diversity_groups_2mm$turb_group_2mm == "Clear"]
turbid_richness_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm$numberOTUs[diversity_groups_2mm$turb_group_2mm == "Turbid"]

clear_evenness_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm$Pielou[diversity_groups_2mm$turb_group_2mm == "Clear"]
turbid_evenness_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm$Pielou[diversity_groups_2mm$turb_group_2mm == "Turbid"]

# Calculate median differences and percent changes
effect_sizes_2mm$richness_turb_median_diff <- median(turbid_richness_2mm) - median(clear_richness_2mm)
effect_sizes_2mm$richness_turb_percent_change <- (median(turbid_richness_2mm) - median(clear_richness_2mm)) / median(clear_richness_2mm) * 100

effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_turb_median_diff <- median(turbid_evenness_2mm) - median(clear_evenness_2mm)
effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_turb_percent_change <- (median(turbid_evenness_2mm) - median(clear_evenness_2mm)) / median(clear_evenness_2mm) * 100

# Depth effect sizes (Shallow_Mesophotic vs Deep_Mesophotic)
shallow_meso_richness_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm$numberOTUs[diversity_groups_2mm$depth_group_2mm == "Shallow_Mesophotic"]
deep_meso_richness_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm$numberOTUs[diversity_groups_2mm$depth_group_2mm == "Deep_Mesophotic"]

shallow_meso_evenness_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm$Pielou[diversity_groups_2mm$depth_group_2mm == "Shallow_Mesophotic"]
deep_meso_evenness_2mm <- diversity_groups_2mm$Pielou[diversity_groups_2mm$depth_group_2mm == "Deep_Mesophotic"]

effect_sizes_2mm$richness_depth_median_diff <- median(deep_meso_richness_2mm) - median(shallow_meso_richness_2mm)
effect_sizes_2mm$richness_depth_percent_change <- (median(deep_meso_richness_2mm) - median(shallow_meso_richness_2mm)) / median(shallow_meso_richness_2mm) * 100

effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_depth_median_diff <- median(deep_meso_evenness_2mm) - median(shallow_meso_evenness_2mm)
effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_depth_percent_change <- (median(deep_meso_evenness_2mm) - median(shallow_meso_evenness_2mm)) / median(shallow_meso_evenness_2mm) * 100

cat("EFFECT SIZES (median differences between environmental extremes):\n")
cat("Richness (Clear vs Turbid): ", round(effect_sizes_2mm$richness_turb_median_diff, 1), " orders (", 
    round(effect_sizes_2mm$richness_turb_percent_change, 1), "% change)\n")
cat("Evenness (Clear vs Turbid): ", round(effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_turb_median_diff, 3), " units (", 
    round(effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_turb_percent_change, 1), "% change)\n")
cat("Richness (Shallow vs Deep Mesophotic): ", round(effect_sizes_2mm$richness_depth_median_diff, 1), " orders (", 
    round(effect_sizes_2mm$richness_depth_percent_change, 1), "% change)\n")
cat("Evenness (Shallow vs Deep Mesophotic): ", round(effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_depth_median_diff, 3), " units (", 
    round(effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_depth_percent_change, 1), "% change)\n")

# ============ 4. RANGE OVERLAP ANALYSIS ================

cat("\n=== RANGE OVERLAP ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Function to calculate range overlap percentage
calculate_overlap <- function(range1, range2) {
  overlap_start <- max(min(range1), min(range2))
  overlap_end <- min(max(range1), max(range2))
  overlap_length <- max(0, overlap_end - overlap_start)
  
  range1_length <- max(range1) - min(range1)
  range2_length <- max(range2) - min(range2)
  
  # Calculate overlap as percentage of smaller range
  smaller_range_length <- min(range1_length, range2_length)
  overlap_percent <- (overlap_length / smaller_range_length) * 100
  
  return(round(overlap_percent, 1))
}

# Calculate range overlaps for environmental groups
richness_turb_overlap_2mm <- calculate_overlap(clear_richness_2mm, turbid_richness_2mm)
evenness_turb_overlap_2mm <- calculate_overlap(clear_evenness_2mm, turbid_evenness_2mm)
richness_depth_overlap_2mm <- calculate_overlap(shallow_meso_richness_2mm, deep_meso_richness_2mm)
evenness_depth_overlap_2mm <- calculate_overlap(shallow_meso_evenness_2mm, deep_meso_evenness_2mm)

cat("RANGE OVERLAPS (% overlap between environmental extremes):\n")
cat("Richness ranges (Clear vs Turbid): ", richness_turb_overlap_2mm, "% overlap\n")
cat("Evenness ranges (Clear vs Turbid): ", evenness_turb_overlap_2mm, "% overlap\n")
cat("Richness ranges (Shallow vs Deep Mesophotic): ", richness_depth_overlap_2mm, "% overlap\n")
cat("Evenness ranges (Shallow vs Deep Mesophotic): ", evenness_depth_overlap_2mm, "% overlap\n")

# ============== 5. PATTERN CONSISTENCY ANALYSIS ================

cat("\n=== PATTERN CONSISTENCY ANALYSIS ===\n")

# How many sites follow predicted environmental patterns?
site_patterns_2mm <- metadata_2mm_diversity %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_richness = mean(numberOTUs),
    mean_evenness = mean(Pielou),
    mean_turbidity = mean(turbidity_std_rank),
    mean_depth = mean(depth),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Predicted patterns based on correlations
    turb_richness_pattern = ifelse(mean_turbidity > median(mean_turbidity) & mean_richness < median(mean_richness), "Expected", 
                                  ifelse(mean_turbidity < median(mean_turbidity) & mean_richness > median(mean_richness), "Expected", "Unexpected")),
    # For depth, focus only on sites within the two mesophotic zones
    depth_group = case_when(
      mean_depth >= 54 & mean_depth <= 66 ~ "Shallow_Mesophotic",
      mean_depth >= 81 & mean_depth <= 85 ~ "Deep_Mesophotic",
      TRUE ~ "Intermediate"
    )
  ) %>%
  # Only evaluate depth patterns for sites in the two main mesophotic zones
  filter(depth_group %in% c("Shallow_Mesophotic", "Deep_Mesophotic")) %>%
  mutate(
    depth_richness_pattern = ifelse(depth_group == "Deep_Mesophotic" & mean_richness < median(mean_richness), "Expected",
                                   ifelse(depth_group == "Shallow_Mesophotic" & mean_richness > median(mean_richness), "Expected", "Unexpected"))
  )

pattern_consistency_2mm <- list(
  turb_consistent = sum(site_patterns_2mm$turb_richness_pattern == "Expected"),
  turb_total = nrow(site_patterns_2mm),
  depth_consistent = sum(site_patterns_2mm$depth_richness_pattern == "Expected"),
  depth_total = nrow(site_patterns_2mm)
)

cat("SITE-LEVEL PATTERN CONSISTENCY:\n")
cat("Sites following turbidity-richness pattern: ", pattern_consistency_2mm$turb_consistent, "/", 
    pattern_consistency_2mm$turb_total, " (", 
    round(pattern_consistency_2mm$turb_consistent/pattern_consistency_2mm$turb_total*100, 1), "%)\n")
cat("Sites following depth-richness pattern (mesophotic zones only): ", pattern_consistency_2mm$depth_consistent, "/", 
    pattern_consistency_2mm$depth_total, " (", 
    round(pattern_consistency_2mm$depth_consistent/pattern_consistency_2mm$depth_total*100, 1), "%)\n")

# ============= 6. EXPORT DESCRIPTIVE RESULTS ===============

cat("\n=== EXPORTING DESCRIPTIVE RESULTS ===\n")

# Create output directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists("./Output_2mm")) dir.create("./Output_2mm")

# Export descriptive statistics
write.csv(turb_desc_stats_2mm, "./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_turbidity_tercile_stats.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(depth_desc_stats_2mm, "./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_depth_tercile_stats.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(correlation_summary_2mm, "./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_correlation_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(site_patterns_2mm, "./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_site_patterns.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Export effect sizes summary
effect_summary_2mm <- data.frame(
  Comparison = c("Clear_vs_Turbid_Richness", "Clear_vs_Turbid_Evenness", 
                 "Shallow_vs_Deep_Richness", "Shallow_vs_Deep_Evenness"),
  Median_Difference = c(effect_sizes_2mm$richness_turb_median_diff, effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_turb_median_diff,
                       effect_sizes_2mm$richness_depth_median_diff, effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_depth_median_diff),
  Percent_Change = c(effect_sizes_2mm$richness_turb_percent_change, effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_turb_percent_change,
                    effect_sizes_2mm$richness_depth_percent_change, effect_sizes_2mm$evenness_depth_percent_change),
  Range_Overlap_Percent = c(richness_turb_overlap_2mm, evenness_turb_overlap_2mm,
                           richness_depth_overlap_2mm, evenness_depth_overlap_2mm)
)

write.csv(effect_summary_2mm, "./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_effect_sizes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("✓ Descriptive results exported to ./Output_2mm/ directory\n")

# =========== 7. SUMMARY FOR MANUSCRIPT REPORTING ===============

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("MOTILE 2MM ALPHA DIVERSITY SUMMARY FOR MANUSCRIPT\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")

cat("SAMPLE OVERVIEW:\n")
cat("Total samples: ", nrow(metadata_2mm_diversity), " ARMS units across ", 
    length(unique(metadata_2mm_diversity$sitelocality)), " sites\n")
cat("Order richness per sample: ", median(metadata_2mm_diversity$numberOTUs), " (IQR: ", 
    quantile(metadata_2mm_diversity$numberOTUs, 0.25), "-", quantile(metadata_2mm_diversity$numberOTUs, 0.75), ")\n")
cat("Pielou's evenness per sample: ", round(median(metadata_2mm_diversity$Pielou), 3), " (IQR: ", 
    round(quantile(metadata_2mm_diversity$Pielou, 0.25), 3), "-", round(quantile(metadata_2mm_diversity$Pielou, 0.75), 3), ")\n")

cat("\nENVIRONMENTAL PATTERNS (effect sizes, not significance):\n")
strongest_corr <- which.max(abs(c(correlations_2mm$richness_depth_spear$estimate, 
                                 correlations_2mm$richness_turb_spear$estimate,
                                 correlations_2mm$evenness_depth_spear$estimate,
                                 correlations_2mm$evenness_turb_spear$estimate)))
corr_names <- c("richness-depth", "richness-turbidity", "evenness-depth", "evenness-turbidity")
cat("Strongest environmental correlation: ", corr_names[strongest_corr], " (ρ = ", 
    round(c(correlations_2mm$richness_depth_spear$estimate, correlations_2mm$richness_turb_spear$estimate,
           correlations_2mm$evenness_depth_spear$estimate, correlations_2mm$evenness_turb_spear$estimate)[strongest_corr], 3), ")\n")

cat("Clear vs turbid water richness difference: ", round(effect_sizes_2mm$richness_turb_median_diff, 1), " orders (", 
    round(abs(effect_sizes_2mm$richness_turb_percent_change), 1), "% difference)\n")
```


#------------------------ NMDS -------------------------

By site, turbidity, and then depth
# Motile 2mm NMDS Ordination Plots
Using turb_ordered_sites and site_colors_2mm
```{r NMDS PREP}
# library(vegan)
# library(ggplot2)
# library(dplyr)
# library(patchwork)

# =============== PREPARE DATA FOR NMDS ===============

# Use 4th root transformed order counts (aligned with PERMANOVA analysis)
motile_4th_root <- order_counts^(1/4)

# Match samples between community and metadata
common_samples <- intersect(rownames(motile_4th_root), rownames(metadata_2mm))
motile_4th_matched <- motile_4th_root[common_samples, ]
metadata_2mm <- metadata_2mm[common_samples, ]

cat("NMDS input data:", nrow(motile_4th_matched), "samples x", ncol(motile_4th_matched), "orders\n")

# ========= NMDS ORDINATION ===========

# Calculate Bray-Curtis dissimilarity
bray_dist <- vegdist(motile_4th_matched, method = "bray")

# NMDS ordination
set.seed(123)  # For reproducibility
nmds_bray <- metaMDS(motile_4th_matched, distance = "bray", k = 2, trymax = 1000)

# Check stress value
cat("NMDS Stress:", round(nmds_bray$stress, 3), "\n")
if(nmds_bray$stress > 0.2) {
  warning("NMDS stress > 0.2 - interpretation should be cautious")
}

# Extract NMDS scores
nmds_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds_bray, display = "sites"))
nmds_scores$sitelocality <- metadata_2mm$sitelocality
nmds_scores$depth <- metadata_2mm$depth
nmds_scores$turbidity_std_rank <- metadata_2mm$turbidity_std_rank
nmds_scores$ARMS_ID <- rownames(nmds_scores)

# Apply factor ordering
nmds_scores$sitelocality <- factor(nmds_scores$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites)

# Function to calculate convex hull
find_hull <- function(df) df[chull(df$NMDS1, df$NMDS2), ]
```

# NMDS by site locality
```{r NMDS site locality}
# Calculate convex hulls for each site
hulls_site <- nmds_scores %>% 
  group_by(sitelocality) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))

# Create the site-based NMDS plot
p_site <- ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_site, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = sitelocality, fill = sitelocality), 
               alpha = 0.4,  
               color = NA) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  # Add points
  geom_point(aes(fill = sitelocality), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
  # Set color scheme
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors_2mm) +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "Motile 2mm Orders: Bray-Curtis NMDS", 
       fill = "Site Locality") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", ncol = 2)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

print(p_site)
```

# NMDS by depth
```{r NMDS by depth}
# Calculate hulls for depth
hulls_depth <- nmds_scores %>% 
  group_by(depth) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))

p_depth <- ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_depth, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = depth, fill = depth), 
               alpha = 0.4,  
               color = NA) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  # Add points
  geom_point(aes(fill = depth), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
  # Color scale
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Depth (m)", direction = -1) +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "Motile 2mm Orders: NMDS by Depth", 
       fill = "Depth (m)") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Depth (m)", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

print(p_depth)
```

# NMDS by turbidity (turbidity standard rank)
```{r NMDS Turbidity}
# Calculate hulls for turbidity
hulls_turb <- nmds_scores %>% 
  group_by(turbidity_std_rank) %>% 
  do(find_hull(.))

p_turb <- ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  # Add hulls
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_turb, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = turbidity_std_rank, fill = turbidity_std_rank), 
               alpha = 0.3,  
               color = NA) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  # Add points
  geom_point(aes(fill = turbidity_std_rank), size = 4, shape = 21) + 
  # Color scale
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = "Turbidity Rank") +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "Motile 2mm Orders: NMDS by Turbidity", 
       fill = "Turbidity Rank") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Turbidity Rank", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1)) +
  annotate('text', x = max(nmds_scores$NMDS1) * 0.8, y = min(nmds_scores$NMDS2) * 0.8, 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmds_bray$stress, 3)), size = 4)

print(p_turb)
```

# Combined NMDS plot
```{r combined NMDS plot}
# Create plots with legends at bottom for the combined figure
p_site_bottom <- p_site + 
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_depth_bottom <- p_depth + 
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_turb_bottom <- p_turb + 
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Combine plots with patchwork
combined_plot <- p_site_bottom | p_depth_bottom | p_turb_bottom

# Add overall title and panel labels
combined_plot <- combined_plot +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Motile 2mm Order Communities: Bray-Curtis NMDS",
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_plot)
```

# Save NMDS plots
```{r save NMDS plots}
# Save individual plots
ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_NMDS_Bray_sites.pdf"), 
       plot = p_site, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_NMDS_depth.pdf"), 
       plot = p_depth, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_NMDS_turbidity.pdf"), 
       plot = p_turb, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Save the combined plot
ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_NMDS_Bray_combined.pdf"), 
       plot = combined_plot, width = 15, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 300)

cat("\n✓ NMDS plots saved for motile 2mm communities\n")
cat("✓ Stress value:", round(nmds_bray$stress, 3), "- interpretation reliability:", 
    ifelse(nmds_bray$stress < 0.1, "excellent", 
           ifelse(nmds_bray$stress < 0.15, "good",
                  ifelse(nmds_bray$stress < 0.2, "acceptable", "poor"))), "\n")

```

# --------------- PERMANOVAs --------------------
# Aligned PERMANOVA with 18S metabarcoding analyses:
# MARGINAL Tests (Individual Effects)
# CONDITIONAL Tests (Explicit Controls using model comparison)  
# SEQUENTIAL Tests (Order Matters)
```{r}
#========================= PREPARE DATA =========================

cat("=== PREPARING MOTILE 2MM DATA (ALIGNED FRAMEWORK) ===\n")

# Use order-level data with 4th root transformation (aligned with metabarcoding)
community_4th_root <- order_counts^(1/4)

# Match samples with metadata
common_samples <- intersect(rownames(community_4th_root), rownames(metadata_2mm))
community_4th_root <- community_4th_root[common_samples, ]
metadata_2mm <- metadata_2mm[common_samples, ]

cat("Community data:", nrow(community_4th_root), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root), "orders\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_4th_root), rownames(metadata_2mm)), "\n")

# Calculate distance matrix
dist_matrix <- vegdist(community_4th_root, method = "bray")

# Check available variables (aligned with metabarcoding focus)
required_vars <- c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank", "latitude", "longitude", "sitelocality")
optional_vars <- c("PP_mean")
available_vars <- intersect(c(required_vars, optional_vars), colnames(metadata_2mm))
has_pp_mean <- "PP_mean" %in% available_vars

cat("Available variables:", paste(available_vars, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("PP_mean available:", has_pp_mean, "\n")

#========================= PERMDISP TESTING =========================

cat("\nTesting PERMDISP assumptions\n")
permdisp_site <- betadisper(dist_matrix, metadata_2mm$sitelocality)
permdisp_test_site <- permutest(permdisp_site, permutations = 999)
f_val <- permdisp_test_site$tab$F[1]
p_val <- permdisp_test_site$tab$`Pr(>F)`[1]
assumption_met <- ifelse(p_val >= 0.05, "PASSED", " VIOLATED")
cat(sprintf("Sitelocality PERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val, p_val, assumption_met))

#========================= HELPER FUNCTION =========================

# Helper function following metabarcoding approach
run_permanova <- function(formula_str, test_name) {
  tryCatch({
    result <- adonis2(
      as.formula(paste("dist_matrix ~", formula_str)),
      data = metadata_2mm,
      permutations = 999,
      by = "terms"
    )
    
    result_df <- as.data.frame(result)
    model_r2 <- sum(result_df[!rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total"), "R2"], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Extract detailed statistics for each term
    term_rows <- !rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total")
    
    if (sum(term_rows) > 0) {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = rownames(result_df)[term_rows],
        Df = result_df[term_rows, "Df"],
        SumOfSqs = result_df[term_rows, "SumOfSqs"],
        R2 = result_df[term_rows, "R2"],
        F_Statistic = result_df[term_rows, "F"],
        P_value = result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"],
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    } else {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = NA,
        Df = NA,
        SumOfSqs = NA,
        R2 = NA,
        F_Statistic = NA,
        P_value = NA,
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    
    return(list(result = result, r2 = model_r2, detailed_stats = detailed_stats))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("%-35s: ERROR - %s\n", test_name, e$message))
    return(list(result = NULL, r2 = NA, detailed_stats = NULL))
  })
}

#========================= INITIALIZE RESULTS =========================

results <- list()
detailed_stats_list <- list()

cat("\nRunning PERMANOVA analyses following metabarcoding framework...\n")

#========================= MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) =========================

cat("\n=== MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) ===\n")

# Individual environmental effects
results$depth_alone <- run_permanova("depth", "Depth Alone")
detailed_stats_list[["depth_alone"]] <- results$depth_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results$depth_alone$r2))

results$turbidity_alone <- run_permanova("turbidity_std_rank", "Turbidity Alone")
detailed_stats_list[["turbidity_alone"]] <- results$turbidity_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Turbidity Alone", results$turbidity_alone$r2))

# Individual geographic effects (following metabarcoding focus)
results$latitude_alone <- run_permanova("latitude", "Latitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list[["latitude_alone"]] <- results$latitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results$latitude_alone$r2))

results$longitude_alone <- run_permanova("longitude", "Longitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list[["longitude_alone"]] <- results$longitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results$longitude_alone$r2))

# PP_mean effect (if available)
if (has_pp_mean) {
  results$pp_alone <- run_permanova("PP_mean", "PP_mean Alone")
  detailed_stats_list[["pp_alone"]] <- results$pp_alone$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "PP_mean Alone", results$pp_alone$r2))
}

# Site effect
results$site_alone <- run_permanova("sitelocality", "Site Effects Alone")
detailed_stats_list[["site_alone"]] <- results$site_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results$site_alone$r2))

#========================= CONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls) =========================

cat("\n=== CONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls) ===\n")
cat("Using model comparison method for true conditional variance partitioning\n")

if (has_pp_mean) {
  # 1. PP_mean | longitude (following metabarcoding framework)
  cat("Running conditional test: PP_mean | longitude\n")
  longitude_only_r2 <- results$longitude_alone$r2
  pp_longitude_result <- run_permanova("longitude + PP_mean", "Longitude + PP_mean")
  pp_longitude_r2 <- pp_longitude_result$r2
  pp_conditional_r2 <- pp_longitude_r2 - longitude_only_r2
  
  results$pp_after_longitude <- list(
    r2 = pp_conditional_r2,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "PP_mean | Longitude",
      Term = "PP_mean_conditional",
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = pp_conditional_r2,
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Model_R2 = pp_conditional_r2,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list[["pp_after_longitude"]] <- results$pp_after_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "PP_mean | Longitude", pp_conditional_r2))
  
  # 2. Longitude | PP_mean (following metabarcoding framework)
  cat("Running conditional test: longitude | PP_mean\n")
  pp_only_r2 <- results$pp_alone$r2
  longitude_conditional_r2 <- pp_longitude_r2 - pp_only_r2
  
  results$longitude_after_pp <- list(
    r2 = longitude_conditional_r2,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "Longitude | PP_mean",
      Term = "longitude_conditional",
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = longitude_conditional_r2,
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Model_R2 = longitude_conditional_r2,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list[["longitude_after_pp"]] <- results$longitude_after_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude | PP_mean", longitude_conditional_r2))
}

#========================= SEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters) =========================

cat("\n=== SEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters) ===\n")
cat("Following metabarcoding sequential model building\n")

# 1. depth + turbidity_std_rank - Sequential: depth first, then turbidity|depth
results$env_baseline <- run_permanova("depth + turbidity_std_rank", "Environmental Baseline (D+T)")
detailed_stats_list[["env_baseline"]] <- results$env_baseline$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline (D+T)", results$env_baseline$r2))

if (has_pp_mean) {
  # 2. depth + turbidity_std_rank + PP_mean - Sequential: env first, then PP|env
  results$env_pp <- run_permanova("depth + turbidity_std_rank + PP_mean", "Environmental + PP_mean")
  detailed_stats_list[["env_pp"]] <- results$env_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + PP_mean", results$env_pp$r2))
}

# 3. depth + turbidity_std_rank + longitude - Sequential: env first, then longitude|env
results$env_longitude <- run_permanova("depth + turbidity_std_rank + longitude", "Environmental + Longitude")
detailed_stats_list[["env_longitude"]] <- results$env_longitude$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Longitude", results$env_longitude$r2))

if (has_pp_mean) {
  # 4. depth + turbidity_std_rank + PP_mean + longitude - Sequential: all variables in order
  results$env_pp_longitude <- run_permanova("depth + turbidity_std_rank + PP_mean + longitude", "Environmental + PP_mean + Longitude")
  detailed_stats_list[["env_pp_longitude"]] <- results$env_pp_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + PP_mean + Longitude", results$env_pp_longitude$r2))
}

# 5. depth + turbidity_std_rank + sitelocality - Sequential: env first, then site|env
results$env_site <- run_permanova("depth + turbidity_std_rank + sitelocality", "Environmental + Site")
detailed_stats_list[["env_site"]] <- results$env_site$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results$env_site$r2))

#========================= ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS =========================

cat("\n=== ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS ===\n")

# Geography | Environment (using model comparison method)
cat("Running conditional test: geography | environment\n")
env_only_r2 <- results$env_baseline$r2
env_spatial_result <- run_permanova("depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude", "Environmental + Spatial")
env_spatial_r2 <- env_spatial_result$r2
spatial_conditional_r2 <- env_spatial_r2 - env_only_r2

results$geography_after_env <- list(
  r2 = spatial_conditional_r2,
  detailed_stats = data.frame(
    Test_Name = "Geography | Environment", 
    Term = "geography_conditional",
    Df = NA,
    SumOfSqs = NA,
    R2 = spatial_conditional_r2,
    F_Statistic = NA,
    P_value = NA,
    Model_R2 = spatial_conditional_r2,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
)
detailed_stats_list[["geography_after_env"]] <- results$geography_after_env$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", spatial_conditional_r2))

# Store the environmental + spatial model
results$env_spatial <- env_spatial_result
detailed_stats_list[["env_spatial"]] <- results$env_spatial$detailed_stats

# Full model
if (has_pp_mean) {
  results$full_model <- run_permanova("depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude + PP_mean", "Full Model")
  detailed_stats_list[["full_model"]] <- results$full_model$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results$full_model$r2))
  
  # Site | All Measured Variables (following metabarcoding)
  cat("Running conditional test: site | all variables\n")
  full_model_r2 <- results$full_model$r2
  site_all_result <- run_permanova("depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude + PP_mean + sitelocality", "Site + All Variables")
  site_all_r2 <- site_all_result$r2
  site_conditional_r2 <- site_all_r2 - full_model_r2
  
  results$site_after_all <- list(
    r2 = site_conditional_r2,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "Site | All Measured Variables",
      Term = "site_conditional", 
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = site_conditional_r2,
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Model_R2 = site_conditional_r2,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list[["site_after_all"]] <- results$site_after_all$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Measured Variables", site_conditional_r2))
}

#========================= COMPILE RESULTS =========================

cat("\n=== COMPILING ALIGNED RESULTS ===\n")

# Combine all detailed statistics
all_detailed_stats <- do.call(rbind, detailed_stats_list[!sapply(detailed_stats_list, is.null)])
all_detailed_stats$Data_Type <- "Motile_2mm"
all_detailed_stats$Fraction <- "order_level"

# Create summary matching metabarcoding format
test_names <- c()
r2_values <- c()

# Add marginal tests
test_names <- c(test_names, "Depth Alone", "Turbidity Alone", "Latitude Alone", "Longitude Alone", "Site Effects Alone")
r2_values <- c(r2_values, results$depth_alone$r2, results$turbidity_alone$r2, results$latitude_alone$r2, results$longitude_alone$r2, results$site_alone$r2)

if (has_pp_mean) {
  test_names <- c(test_names, "PP_mean Alone", "PP_mean | Longitude", "Longitude | PP_mean")
  r2_values <- c(r2_values, results$pp_alone$r2, results$pp_after_longitude$r2, results$longitude_after_pp$r2)
}

# Add sequential tests
test_names <- c(test_names, "Environmental Baseline", "Environmental + Site", "Geography | Environment")
r2_values <- c(r2_values, results$env_baseline$r2, results$env_site$r2, results$geography_after_env$r2)

if (has_pp_mean) {
  test_names <- c(test_names, "Environmental + PP_mean", "Full Model", "Site | All Measured Variables")
  r2_values <- c(r2_values, results$env_pp$r2, results$full_model$r2, results$site_after_all$r2)
}

summary_results <- data.frame(
  Test = test_names,
  R2 = r2_values,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sort by R² for interpretation
summary_results <- summary_results[order(summary_results$R2, decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE), ]

#========================= SAVE RESULTS =========================

# Save results with aligned naming
write.csv(all_detailed_stats, 
          file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_detailed_statistics.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(summary_results, 
          file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_summary.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

#========================= RESULTS SUMMARY =========================

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("MOTILE 2MM PERMANOVA RESULTS - ALIGNED WITH METABARCODING FRAMEWORK\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")

cat("\nMARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results$depth_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Turbidity Alone", results$turbidity_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results$latitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results$longitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results$site_alone$r2))

if (has_pp_mean) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "PP_mean Alone", results$pp_alone$r2))
  
  cat("\nCONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls):\n")
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "PP_mean | Longitude", results$pp_after_longitude$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude | PP_mean", results$longitude_after_pp$r2))
}

cat("\nSEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline", results$env_baseline$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results$env_site$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", results$geography_after_env$r2))

if (has_pp_mean) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + PP_mean", results$env_pp$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results$full_model$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Variables", results$site_after_all$r2))
}

cat(sprintf("\nPERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val, p_val, assumption_met))

```

# Conditional Tests and Variance Partitioning
```{r}
# =============== ADDITIONAL CONDITIONAL TESTS FOR 2MM VARIANCE PARTITIONING ===============

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("RUNNING ADDITIONAL CONDITIONAL TESTS - 2MM BARCODED MACROFAUNA\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

# Create distance matrix if not already created
if (!exists("distance_matrix_2mm")) {
  distance_matrix_2mm <- vegdist(community_final, method = "bray")
  cat("✓ Created Bray-Curtis distance matrix\n")
}

# Initialize list for additional models
additional_models_2mm <- list()

# ============ GEOGRAPHY | ENVIRONMENT TESTS ============

cat("\n--- Geography | Environment Tests ---\n")

# 1. Geography after Environment (you already have this as spatial_after_env)
# Just renaming for clarity
if ("spatial_after_env" %in% names(motile_models)) {
  additional_models_2mm[["geography_after_env"]] <- motile_models$spatial_after_env
  cat("✓ Geography | Environment (lat + lon | depth + turbidity)\n")
}

# 2. PP_mean + Longitude after Environment 
if ("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_final)) {
  try({
    additional_models_2mm[["pp_longitude_after_env"]] <- dbrda(
      distance_matrix_2mm ~ PP_mean + longitude + Condition(depth + turbidity_std_rank), 
      data = metadata_final
    )
    cat("✓ PP_mean + Longitude | Environment\n")
  })
}

# ============ PP_MEAN | GEOGRAPHY TESTS ============

cat("\n--- PP_mean | Geography Tests ---\n")

if ("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_final)) {
  
  # 3. PP_mean after Geography
  try({
    additional_models_2mm[["pp_after_geography"]] <- dbrda(
      distance_matrix_2mm ~ PP_mean + Condition(latitude + longitude), 
      data = metadata_final
    )
    cat("✓ PP_mean | Geography (lat + lon)\n")
  })
  
  # 4. PP_mean after All Geography (including both lat and lon)
  try({
    additional_models_2mm[["pp_after_all_geography"]] <- dbrda(
      distance_matrix_2mm ~ PP_mean + Condition(latitude + longitude), 
      data = metadata_final
    )
    cat("✓ PP_mean | All Geography\n")
  })
}

# ============ GEOGRAPHY | PP_MEAN TESTS ============

cat("\n--- Geography | PP_mean Tests ---\n")

if ("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_final)) {
  
  # 5. Geography (lat + lon) after PP_mean
  try({
    additional_models_2mm[["geography_after_pp"]] <- dbrda(
      distance_matrix_2mm ~ latitude + longitude + Condition(PP_mean), 
      data = metadata_final
    )
    cat("✓ Geography (lat + lon) | PP_mean\n")
  })
  
  # 6. All Geography after PP_mean
  try({
    additional_models_2mm[["all_geography_after_pp"]] <- dbrda(
      distance_matrix_2mm ~ latitude + longitude + Condition(PP_mean), 
      data = metadata_final
    )
    cat("✓ All Geography | PP_mean\n")
  })
}

# ============ SITE | ALL VARIABLES TESTS ============

cat("\n--- Site | All Variables Tests ---\n")

# 7. Site after all measured variables (Environment + Geography)
try({
  additional_models_2mm[["site_after_env_spatial"]] <- dbrda(
    distance_matrix_2mm ~ sitelocality + Condition(depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude), 
    data = metadata_final
  )
  cat("✓ Site | Environment + Geography\n")
})

# 8. Site after ALL measured variables (including PP_mean if available)
if ("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_final)) {
  try({
    additional_models_2mm[["site_after_all_measured"]] <- dbrda(
      distance_matrix_2mm ~ sitelocality + Condition(depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude + PP_mean), 
      data = metadata_final
    )
    cat("✓ Site | All Measured Variables (Env + Spatial + PP)\n")
  })
} else {
  # If no PP_mean, use env + spatial only
  additional_models_2mm[["site_after_all_measured"]] <- additional_models_2mm[["site_after_env_spatial"]]
}

# ============ EXTRACT R² VALUES ============

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("EXTRACTING R² VALUES FOR VARIANCE PARTITIONING\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

# Function to extract R² from conditional models
extract_conditional_r2_2mm <- function(model, test_name) {
  tryCatch({
    r2_result <- RsquareAdj(model)
    anova_result <- anova(model, permutations = 999)
    
    result <- data.frame(
      Test_Name = test_name,
      R2 = round(r2_result$r.squared, 6),
      Adj_R2 = round(r2_result$adj.r.squared, 6),
      F_stat = round(anova_result$F[1], 4),
      p_value = anova_result$`Pr(>F)`[1],
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    cat(sprintf("%-45s R² = %.4f (p = %.3f)\n", test_name, result$R2, result$p_value))
    
    return(result)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("%-45s ERROR\n", test_name))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Extract results for all additional models
variance_partition_results_2mm <- lapply(names(additional_models_2mm), function(name) {
  extract_conditional_r2_2mm(additional_models_2mm[[name]], name)
})

variance_partition_results_2mm <- bind_rows(variance_partition_results_2mm)

# ============ CREATE VARIANCE PARTITIONING TABLE ============
```
