```{r}
cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("VARIANCE PARTITIONING SUMMARY TABLE\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

# Create formatted table matching your supplementary table structure
variance_partition_table_2mm <- data.frame(
  Data = "2mm_barcoding",
  Test_Name = c(
    "Geography | Environment",
    "PP_mean + Longitude | Environment", 
    "PP_mean | Geography",
    "PP_mean | All Geography",
    "Geography | PP_mean",
    "All Geography | PP_mean",
    "Site | Environment + Spatial",
    "Site | All Measured Variables"
  ),
  Test_Display = c(
    "Geography | Environment",
    "PP_mean | Longitude | Environment †",
    "PP_mean | Geography *",
    "PP_mean | All Geography",
    "Geography | PP_mean †",
    "All Geography | PP_mean",
    "Site | Env + Spatial",
    "Site | All Variables"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Match R² values to the table
variance_partition_table_2mm$R2_motile <- NA

# Map the results
result_mapping <- c(
  "Geography | Environment" = "geography_after_env",
  "PP_mean + Longitude | Environment" = "pp_longitude_after_env",
  "PP_mean | Geography" = "pp_after_geography",
  "PP_mean | All Geography" = "pp_after_all_geography",
  "Geography | PP_mean" = "geography_after_pp",
  "All Geography | PP_mean" = "all_geography_after_pp",
  "Site | Environment + Spatial" = "site_after_env_spatial",
  "Site | All Measured Variables" = "site_after_all_measured"
)

for (i in 1:nrow(variance_partition_table_2mm)) {
  test_name <- variance_partition_table_2mm$Test_Name[i]
  model_name <- result_mapping[test_name]
  
  if (!is.na(model_name) && model_name %in% variance_partition_results_2mm$Test_Name) {
    r2_value <- variance_partition_results_2mm$R2[variance_partition_results_2mm$Test_Name == model_name]
    variance_partition_table_2mm$R2_motile[i] <- r2_value
  }
}

print(variance_partition_table_2mm)

# ============ SAVE RESULTS ============

write.csv(variance_partition_table_2mm, 
          "2mm_variance_partitioning_table.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(variance_partition_results_2mm,
          "2mm_all_conditional_test_results.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n✓ Results saved to:\n")
cat("  - 2mm_variance_partitioning_table.csv\n")
cat("  - 2mm_all_conditional_test_results.csv\n")

# ============ INTERPRETATION ============

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("INTERPRETATION OF VARIANCE PARTITIONING\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

cat("Pure effects represent UNIQUE variance explained by each predictor set\n")
cat("after controlling for covariation with other predictors.\n\n")

if (nrow(variance_partition_table_2mm) > 0) {
  cat("Key findings:\n")
  cat(sprintf("- Geography beyond Environment: R² = %.4f\n", 
              variance_partition_table_2mm$R2_motile[variance_partition_table_2mm$Test_Name == "Geography | Environment"]))
  
  if ("PP_mean | Geography" %in% variance_partition_table_2mm$Test_Name) {
    cat(sprintf("- PP_mean beyond Geography: R² = %.4f\n", 
                variance_partition_table_2mm$R2_motile[variance_partition_table_2mm$Test_Name == "PP_mean | Geography"]))
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("- Site effects beyond all measured variables: R² = %.4f\n", 
              variance_partition_table_2mm$R2_motile[variance_partition_table_2mm$Test_Name == "Site | All Measured Variables"]))
}
```

# Add Geographic combined model
```{r}
cat("\n=== ADDING GEOGRAPHIC COMBINED MODEL ===\n")

# Geographic Combined: latitude + longitude (without environmental variables)
results$geographic_combined <- run_permanova("latitude + longitude", "Geographic Combined (Lat+Long)")
detailed_stats_list[["geographic_combined"]] <- results$geographic_combined$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geographic Combined (Lat+Long)", results$geographic_combined$r2))

# =============== EXTRACT TERM-BY-TERM STATISTICS ===============

cat("\n=== EXTRACTING TERM-BY-TERM STATISTICS FOR SUPPLEMENTARY TABLE S2d ===\n")

# Function to extract detailed term statistics
extract_term_stats_2mm <- function(permanova_result, model_name) {
  
  if (is.null(permanova_result$result)) {
    cat(sprintf("Skipping %s - no results available\n", model_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  result_df <- as.data.frame(permanova_result$result)
  
  # Remove Residual and Total rows
  term_rows <- !rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total")
  
  if (sum(term_rows) == 0) {
    cat(sprintf("Skipping %s - no term data\n", model_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Extract statistics for each term
  terms_df <- data.frame(
    Model = model_name,
    Term = rownames(result_df)[term_rows],
    Df = result_df[term_rows, "Df"],
    SumOfSqs = round(result_df[term_rows, "SumOfSqs"], 6),
    R2 = round(result_df[term_rows, "R2"], 6),
    F_statistic = round(result_df[term_rows, "F"], 4),
    P_value = result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Add formatted p-values
  terms_df$P_formatted <- ifelse(is.na(terms_df$P_value), "",
                                  ifelse(terms_df$P_value < 0.001, "< 0.001",
                                         sprintf("%.3f", terms_df$P_value)))
  
  terms_df$Significance <- case_when(
    is.na(terms_df$P_value) ~ "",
    terms_df$P_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
    terms_df$P_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
    terms_df$P_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
    terms_df$P_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
    TRUE ~ ""
  )
  
  cat(sprintf("\n%s:\n", model_name))
  for (i in 1:nrow(terms_df)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %-25s: Df=%d | SS=%.4f | R²=%.4f | F=%.2f | p=%s %s\n",
                terms_df$Term[i], terms_df$Df[i], terms_df$SumOfSqs[i],
                terms_df$R2[i], terms_df$F_statistic[i], 
                terms_df$P_formatted[i], terms_df$Significance[i]))
  }
  
  return(terms_df)
}

# =============== EXTRACT FOR ALL KEY MODELS ===============

term_stats_2mm <- list()

# 1. Environmental Baseline (depth + turbidity)
term_stats_2mm[["env_baseline"]] <- extract_term_stats_2mm(
  results$env_baseline,
  "Environmental Baseline"
)

# 2. Geographic Combined (latitude + longitude) - NEW!
term_stats_2mm[["geographic_combined"]] <- extract_term_stats_2mm(
  results$geographic_combined,
  "Geographic Combined"
)

# 3. Environmental + Spatial (depth + turbidity + latitude + longitude)
term_stats_2mm[["env_spatial"]] <- extract_term_stats_2mm(
  results$env_spatial,
  "Environmental + Spatial"
)

# 4. Full Model (if PP_mean available)
if (has_pp_mean && !is.null(results$full_model)) {
  term_stats_2mm[["full_model"]] <- extract_term_stats_2mm(
    results$full_model,
    "Full Model"
  )
}

# =============== COMBINE INTO SUPPLEMENTARY TABLE S2d FORMAT ===============

combined_term_stats_2mm <- bind_rows(term_stats_2mm)

# Add data type column
combined_term_stats_2mm <- combined_term_stats_2mm %>%
  mutate(Data = "2mm_barcoding", .before = Model)

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 90), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("SUPPLEMENTARY TABLE S2d - TERM-BY-TERM PERMANOVA RESULTS (2MM)\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 90), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

print(combined_term_stats_2mm %>%
  select(Data, Model, Term, Df, SumOfSqs, R2, F_statistic, P_formatted, Significance))

# =============== CREATE FORMATTED TABLE ===============

# Format exactly as shown in your supplementary table
table_s2d_2mm <- combined_term_stats_2mm %>%
  mutate(
    Stats_Display = sprintf("%d | %.6f | %.6f | %.4f | %s",
                           Df, SumOfSqs, R2, F_statistic, P_formatted)
  ) %>%
  select(Data, Model, Term, Stats_Display, Df, SumOfSqs, R2, F_statistic, P_value)

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 90), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("FORMATTED FOR PUBLICATION (Df | SumOfSqs | R² | F | P)\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 90), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

print(table_s2d_2mm)

# =============== SAVE RESULTS ===============

write.csv(combined_term_stats_2mm,
          "./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_Table_S2d_term_statistics.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(table_s2d_2mm,
          "./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_Table_S2d_formatted.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n✓ Results saved to:\n")
cat("  - Motile_2mm_Table_S2d_term_statistics.csv\n")
cat("  - Motile_2mm_Table_S2d_formatted.csv\n")

# =============== SUMMARY INTERPRETATION ===============

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 90), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("KEY FINDINGS - SEQUENTIAL TERM CONTRIBUTIONS\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 90), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

cat("ENVIRONMENTAL BASELINE (depth → turbidity|depth):\n")
env_terms <- combined_term_stats_2mm %>% filter(Model == "Environmental Baseline")
if (nrow(env_terms) > 0) {
  for (i in 1:nrow(env_terms)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: R² = %.4f (p = %s)\n", 
                env_terms$Term[i], env_terms$R2[i], env_terms$P_formatted[i]))
  }
}

cat("\nGEOGRAPHIC COMBINED (latitude → longitude|latitude):\n")
geo_terms <- combined_term_stats_2mm %>% filter(Model == "Geographic Combined")
if (nrow(geo_terms) > 0) {
  for (i in 1:nrow(geo_terms)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: R² = %.4f (p = %s)\n", 
                geo_terms$Term[i], geo_terms$R2[i], geo_terms$P_formatted[i]))
  }
}

cat("\nENVIRONMENTAL + SPATIAL (depth → turbidity|depth → latitude|env → longitude|env+lat):\n")
env_spatial_terms <- combined_term_stats_2mm %>% filter(Model == "Environmental + Spatial")
if (nrow(env_spatial_terms) > 0) {
  for (i in 1:nrow(env_spatial_terms)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: R² = %.4f (p = %s)\n", 
                env_spatial_terms$Term[i], env_spatial_terms$R2[i], 
                env_spatial_terms$P_formatted[i]))
  }
}

if (has_pp_mean) {
  cat("\nFULL MODEL (depth → turbidity|depth → latitude|env → longitude|env+lat → PP_mean|all):\n")
  full_terms <- combined_term_stats_2mm %>% filter(Model == "Full Model")
  if (nrow(full_terms) > 0) {
    for (i in 1:nrow(full_terms)) {
      cat(sprintf("  %s: R² = %.4f (p = %s)\n", 
                  full_terms$Term[i], full_terms$R2[i], full_terms$P_formatted[i]))
    }
  }
}

cat("\n→ Term order shows SEQUENTIAL contribution (each term added after previous terms)\n")
cat("→ This differs from MARGINAL tests which show individual effects\n")
```


# --------------- PCoAs --------------
# Motile 2mm PCoA Analysis - Adapted from CoralNet Framework
```{r}
#library(ape)      # for pcoa function
#library(vegan)    # for envfit
#library(ggplot2)
#library(dplyr)
#library(patchwork)
#library(tidyr)

# ========= PREPARE DATA FOR PCoA =============

# Use 4th root transformed order counts (same as PERMANOVA and NMDS)
motile_4th_root <- order_counts^(1/4)

# Match samples between community and metadata
common_samples <- intersect(rownames(motile_4th_root), rownames(metadata_2mm))
community_4th_root <- motile_4th_root[common_samples, ]
metadata_2mm <- metadata_2mm[common_samples, ]

cat("=== MOTILE 2MM PCoA DATA SETUP ===\n")
cat("Community data:", nrow(community_4th_root), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root), "orders\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_4th_root), rownames(metadata_2mm)), "\n")

# =============== CALCULATE PCoA USING 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED DATA ============

# Calculate Bray-Curtis distance from 4th root transformed data
bray_dist <- vegdist(community_4th_root, method = "bray")

# Run PCoA
pcoa_result <- pcoa(bray_dist)

# Extract PCoA scores
pcoa_scores <- as.data.frame(pcoa_result$vectors[, 1:2])
colnames(pcoa_scores) <- c("PCoA1", "PCoA2")

# Add metadata
pcoa_scores$sitelocality <- metadata_2mm$sitelocality
pcoa_scores$ARMS_ID <- rownames(pcoa_scores)
pcoa_scores$depth <- metadata_2mm$depth
pcoa_scores$turbidity_std_rank <- metadata_2mm$turbidity_std_rank

# Add PP_mean if available
if("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_2mm)) {
  pcoa_scores$PP_mean <- metadata_2mm$PP_mean
  cat("PP_mean added to PCoA scores\n")
} else {
  cat("PP_mean not found in metadata\n")
}

# Add temperature if available
if("temp_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_2mm)) {
  pcoa_scores$temp_mean <- metadata_2mm$temp_mean
  cat("temp_mean added to PCoA scores\n")
} else {
  cat("temp_mean not found in metadata\n")
}


# Filter to only available sites
available_sites <- unique(pcoa_scores$sitelocality)
ordered_sites <- turb_ordered_sites[turb_ordered_sites %in% available_sites]
pcoa_scores$sitelocality <- factor(pcoa_scores$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites)

# Calculate variance explained by each axis
pcoa_var_explained <- pcoa_result$values$Relative_eig * 100
axis1_var_pcoa <- round(pcoa_var_explained[1], 1)
axis2_var_pcoa <- round(pcoa_var_explained[2], 1)

cat("=== PCoA RESULTS (4th Root Transformed Motile Data) ===\n")
cat("PCoA1 explains:", axis1_var_pcoa, "% of variance\n")
cat("PCoA2 explains:", axis2_var_pcoa, "% of variance\n")
cat("Total explained by first 2 axes:", round(axis1_var_pcoa + axis2_var_pcoa, 1), "%\n")


# =========== PANEL A: PCoA BY SITE ================

p_pcoa_site <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # Add points with motile styling
  geom_point(aes(fill = sitelocality), size = 8, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
  
  # Use motile color scheme
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors_2mm) +
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "Motile 2mm Orders: PCoA Bray-Curtis (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)"),
       fill = "Site") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", ncol = 3, override.aes = list(size = 4)))

print(p_pcoa_site)

# ============= PANEL B: PCoA BY DEPTH =======================

p_pcoa_depth <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # Add points colored by depth
  geom_point(aes(fill = depth), size = 8, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
  
  # Depth color scale (consistent with NMDS)
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Depth (meters)", direction = -1) +
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "Motile 2mm Orders: PCoA by Depth (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)")) +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Depth (meters)", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1))

print(p_pcoa_depth)

# ========== PANEL C: PCoA BY TURBIDITY ===================

p_pcoa_turb <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # Add points colored by turbidity
  geom_point(aes(fill = turbidity_std_rank), size = 8, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
  
  # Turbidity color scale (consistent with NMDS)
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = "Turbidity Rank") +
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "Motile 2mm Orders: PCoA by Turbidity (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)")) +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Turbidity Rank", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1))

print(p_pcoa_turb)

# ============== PANEL D: PCoA BY PP_MEAN  =====================
if("PP_mean" %in% colnames(pcoa_scores)) {
  p_pcoa_pp <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
    # Add reference lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
    
    # Add points colored by PP_mean
    geom_point(aes(fill = PP_mean), size = 8, shape = 21, 
               color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
    
    # PP_mean color scale
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = "Primary Productivity") +
    
    # Labels and theme
    labs(title = "Motile 2mm Orders: PCoA by Primary Productivity (4th Root)", 
         x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
         y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)")) +
    theme_light() + 
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Primary Productivity", 
                                 title.position = "top", 
                                 barwidth = 15, barheight = 1))
  
  print(p_pcoa_pp)
} else {
  p_pcoa_pp <- NULL
}

# ============== CREATE COMBINED PLOT ================

# Remove individual titles for combined plot
p_pcoa_site_panel <- p_pcoa_site + labs(title = NULL)
p_pcoa_depth_panel <- p_pcoa_depth + labs(title = NULL)
p_pcoa_turb_panel <- p_pcoa_turb + labs(title = NULL)
p_pcoa_pp_panel <- p_pcoa_pp + labs(title = NULL)

# Basic three-panel combination
combined_pcoa_final <- p_pcoa_site_panel | p_pcoa_depth_panel | p_pcoa_turb_panel | p_pcoa_pp_panel

# Add overall title and panel labels
combined_pcoa_final <- combined_pcoa_final +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Motile 2mm Order Communities: PCoA Bray-Curtis (4th Root Transformed)",
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_pcoa_final)

# ===========  ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATION ANALYSIS ===============

cat("\n=== PCoA ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATION ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Extract PCoA scores (first 4 axes for comprehensive analysis)
pcoa_scores_all <- as.data.frame(pcoa_result$vectors[, 1:4])
colnames(pcoa_scores_all) <- paste0("PCoA", 1:4)

# Calculate variance explained for all axes
pcoa_var_all <- round(pcoa_result$values$Relative_eig * 100, 2)
names(pcoa_var_all) <- paste0("PCoA", 1:length(pcoa_var_all))

for(i in 1:min(4, length(pcoa_var_all))) {
  cat(paste0("PCoA", i, ": ", pcoa_var_all[i], "%\n"))
}
cat("Cumulative (first 4 axes):", sum(pcoa_var_all[1:4]), "%\n\n")

# Prepare environmental variables for fitting
env_vars_for_fit <- metadata_2mm %>%
  dplyr::select(depth, turbidity_std_rank, latitude, longitude)
  # Add PP_mean if available
if("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata_2mm)) {
  env_vars_for_fit$PP_mean <- metadata_2mm$PP_mean
  cat("PP_mean added to environmental variables\n")
}

# Test environmental correlations with PCoA axes
cat("Environmental fitting to PCoA axes...\n")
envfit_all <- envfit(pcoa_scores_all[, 1:2], env_vars_for_fit, permutations = 999)
print(envfit_all)

# Extract results for reporting
envfit_results <- data.frame(
  Variable = rownames(envfit_all$vectors$arrows),
  PCoA1_correlation = envfit_all$vectors$arrows[, 1],
  PCoA2_correlation = envfit_all$vectors$arrows[, 2],
  R_squared = envfit_all$vectors$r,
  p_value = envfit_all$vectors$pvals,
  Significance = ifelse(envfit_all$vectors$pvals < 0.001, "***",
                       ifelse(envfit_all$vectors$pvals < 0.01, "**",
                       ifelse(envfit_all$vectors$pvals < 0.05, "*", ""))),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(envfit_results)

# ============ INDIVIDUAL VARIABLE CORRELATIONS WITH ALL PCoA AXES ===========

cat("\nCalculating individual correlations with PCoA axes...\n")

individual_correlations <- data.frame()

for(var_name in colnames(env_vars_for_fit)) {
  env_var <- env_vars_for_fit[[var_name]]
  
  for(axis in 1:4) {
    pcoa_axis <- pcoa_scores_all[[paste0("PCoA", axis)]]
    
    # Calculate correlation (warnings about ties are normal and harmless)
    cor_result <- cor.test(env_var, pcoa_axis, method = "spearman")
    
    individual_correlations <- rbind(individual_correlations, data.frame(
      Environmental_Variable = var_name,
      PCoA_Axis = paste0("PCoA", axis),
      Correlation = cor_result$estimate,
      p_value = cor_result$p.value,
      Significance = dplyr::case_when(
        cor_result$p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        cor_result$p.value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
        cor_result$p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        cor_result$p.value < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
}

# Create wide format for easier interpretation
individual_correlations_wide <- individual_correlations %>%
  dplyr::select(-p_value, -Significance) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PCoA_Axis, values_from = Correlation) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(abs(PCoA1)))

print(individual_correlations_wide)

# =========== ENVIRONMENTAL VECTORS OVERLAY ON PCoA PLOT ==============

cat("\nCreating PCoA plot with environmental vectors...\n")

# Create plot with significant environmental vectors
sig_vectors <- envfit_results[envfit_results$p_value < 0.05, ]

if(nrow(sig_vectors) > 0) {
  # Calculate scaling for vectors
  plot_range <- max(abs(range(pcoa_scores$PCoA1, pcoa_scores$PCoA2)))
  vector_scale <- plot_range * 0.8
  
  p_pcoa_envfit <- ggplot(pcoa_scores, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
    # Add reference lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.5) +
    
    # Add points
    geom_point(aes(fill = sitelocality), size = 5, shape = 21, 
               color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
    
    # Color scheme
    scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors_2mm) +
    
    # Add environmental vectors
    geom_segment(data = sig_vectors,
                 aes(x = 0, y = 0, 
                     xend = PCoA1_correlation * vector_scale, 
                     yend = PCoA2_correlation * vector_scale),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")), 
                 color = "#C74238", size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    
    # Add vector labels
    geom_text(data = sig_vectors,
              aes(x = PCoA1_correlation * vector_scale * 1.15, 
                  y = PCoA2_correlation * vector_scale * 1.15, 
                  label = paste0(Variable, "\n(R²=", round(R_squared, 2), ")")),
              color = "#C74238", size = 3, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    
    # Labels and theme
    labs(title = "Motile 2mm PCoA with Environmental Vectors (4th Root Transformed)", 
         x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa, "%)"),
         y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa, "%)"),
         fill = "Site") +
    theme_light() + 
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
          axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
          axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 14)) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", ncol = 3, override.aes = list(size = 3)))
  
  print(p_pcoa_envfit)
} else {
  cat("No significant environmental vectors found\n")
  p_pcoa_envfit <- NULL
}

# =============  SAVE PLOTS AND RESULTS ==============
# Save individual plots
ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_BrayCurtis_Sites_4thRoot.pdf"), 
       plot = p_pcoa_site, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_BrayCurtis_Depth_4thRoot.pdf"), 
       plot = p_pcoa_depth, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_BrayCurtis_Turbidity_4thRoot.pdf"), 
       plot = p_pcoa_turb, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

if(!is.null(p_pcoa_temp)) {
  ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_BrayCurtis_Temperature_4thRoot.pdf"), 
         plot = p_pcoa_temp, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
}

if(!is.null(p_pcoa_pp)) {
  ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_BrayCurtis_PP_mean_4thRoot.pdf"), 
         plot = p_pcoa_pp, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
}

# Save the combined plot
ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_BrayCurtis_Combined_4thRoot.pdf"), 
       plot = combined_pcoa_final, width = 19, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

if(!is.null(p_pcoa_envfit)) {
  ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_with_EnvVectors_4thRoot.pdf"), 
         plot = p_pcoa_envfit, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
}

# Export numerical results
write.csv(envfit_results, 
          file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_envfit_results_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(individual_correlations, 
          file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_individual_correlations_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Export PCoA variance explained
pcoa_variance <- data.frame(
  Axis = paste0("PCoA", 1:4),
  Variance_Explained = pcoa_var_all[1:4],
  Cumulative_Variance = cumsum(pcoa_var_all[1:4])
)
write.csv(pcoa_variance, 
          file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_variance_explained_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Export PCoA scores with metadata
write.csv(pcoa_scores, 
          file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_PCoA_scores_4thRoot.csv"), 
          row.names = TRUE)

# ============== SUMMARY ======================

cat("\n=== MOTILE 2MM PCoA ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("PCoA ordination completed\n")
cat("Variance explained by first 2 axes:", round(axis1_var_pcoa + axis2_var_pcoa, 1), "%\n")
cat("Number of samples:", nrow(pcoa_scores), "\n")
cat("Number of orders:", ncol(community_4th_root), "\n")
cat("Environmental variables tested:", ncol(env_vars_for_fit), "\n")

if(exists("sig_vectors") && nrow(sig_vectors) > 0) {
  cat("Significant environmental vectors:", nrow(sig_vectors), "\n")
  cat("  Variables:", paste(sig_vectors$Variable, collapse = ", "), "\n")
} else {
  cat("No significant environmental vectors found\n")
}

n_plots_created <- 3 + (!is.null(p_pcoa_temp)) + (!is.null(p_pcoa_pp)) + (!is.null(p_pcoa_envfit))
cat("Plots created:", n_plots_created, "\n")
```


# ------------- dbRDAs -------------
# Motile 2mm dbRDA Analysis - Adapted from CoralNet Framework
```{r setup}
#library(vegan)
#library(ggplot2)
#library(gridExtra)
#library(grid)
#library(dplyr)
#library(tidyr)
#library(cowplot)

cat("Setting up motile 2mm dbRDA analysis...\n")

# Use 4th root transformed order counts (consistent with PERMANOVA/PCoA)
community_4th_root <- order_counts^(1/4)
metadata_2mm <- metadata_2mm

# Align data
common_samples <- intersect(rownames(community_4th_root), rownames(metadata_2mm))
community_final <- community_4th_root[common_samples, ]
metadata_final <- metadata_2mm[common_samples, ]

# Remove empty samples/orders
community_final <- community_final[rowSums(community_final) > 0, ]
community_final <- community_final[, colSums(community_final) > 0]

# Final alignment
final_samples <- rownames(community_final)
metadata_final <- metadata_final[final_samples, ]

cat("Final motile dataset dimensions:\n")
cat("  Community:", dim(community_final), "\n")
cat("  Metadata:", dim(metadata_final), "\n")
cat("  Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_final), rownames(metadata_final)), "\n")

# ============== SITE COLORS ================

motile_site_colors <- c(
  "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E",
  "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C", 
  "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30",
  "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
  "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E",
  "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E", 
  "McGrail_deep" = "#015951",
  "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3",
  "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
  "Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077",
  "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599",
  "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599"
)
```

# Create dbRDA functions
```{r create dbRDA functions}
run_motile_dbrda <- function(community_data, metadata, dataset_name = "Motile_2mm_Orders") {
  
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat("ANALYZING:", dataset_name, "\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  # Create Bray-Curtis dissimilarity matrix
  distance_matrix <- vegdist(community_data, method = "bray")
  
  cat("Samples in analysis:", nrow(community_data), "\n")
  cat("Orders in analysis:", ncol(community_data), "\n")
  
  # Check for required variables
  required_vars <- c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank", "latitude", "longitude")
  missing_vars <- required_vars[!required_vars %in% colnames(metadata)]
  if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
    cat("Missing variables:", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Initialize results storage
  analyses <- list()
  
  # ========= CORE ENVIRONMENTAL TESTS ==================
  
  cat("\nRunning environmental tests for motile organisms...\n")
  
  # Individual environmental drivers
  try({
    analyses[["depth_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Depth alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  try({
    analyses[["turbidity_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ turbidity_std_rank, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Turbidity alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  # Combined environmental model
  try({
    analyses[["environmental"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Environmental model (depth + turbidity) complete\n")
  })
  
  # ============= SPATIAL COMPARISON TESTS ================
  
  cat("\nRunning spatial comparison tests...\n")
  
  # Individual spatial drivers
  try({
    analyses[["latitude_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ latitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Latitude alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  try({
    analyses[["longitude_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ longitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Longitude alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  # Combined spatial model
  try({
    analyses[["spatial"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ latitude + longitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Spatial model (lat + lon) complete\n")
  })
  
  # Combined environmental + spatial model
  try({
    analyses[["env_spatial_combined"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Combined environmental + spatial model complete\n")
  })
  
  # ================ PRODUCTIVITY TESTS =================
  
  if ("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata)) {
    cat("\nRunning productivity tests...\n")
    
    try({
      analyses[["productivity_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ PP_mean, data = metadata)
      cat("✓ Productivity alone analysis complete\n")
    })
    
    try({
      analyses[["full_model"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude + PP_mean, data = metadata)
      cat("✓ Full model with productivity complete\n")
    })
  }
  
  # ================== CONDITIONAL TESTS ======================
  
  cat("\nRunning conditional tests for motile organisms...\n")
  
  # Turbidity beyond depth
  try({
    analyses[["turbidity_after_depth"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ turbidity_std_rank + Condition(depth), data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Turbidity | depth conditional test complete\n")
  })
  
  # Geography beyond environment
  try({
    analyses[["spatial_after_env"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ latitude + longitude + Condition(depth + turbidity_std_rank), data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Spatial | environmental conditional test complete\n")
  })
  
  # Longitude beyond productivity
  if ("PP_mean" %in% colnames(metadata)) {
    try({
      analyses[["longitude_after_productivity"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ longitude + Condition(PP_mean), data = metadata)
      cat("✓ Longitude | productivity conditional test complete\n")
    })
  }
  
  # ============== SITE EFFECTS  ==================
  
  try({
    analyses[["site_only"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ sitelocality, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Site-only model complete\n")
  })
  
  # =============== EXTRACT RESULTS =============
  
  cat("\nExtracting results...\n")
  
  # Initialize results dataframe
  results <- data.frame(
    Dataset = dataset_name,
    Analysis = names(analyses),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Extract statistics for each analysis
  for (i in 1:length(analyses)) {
    model <- analyses[[i]]
    analysis_name <- names(analyses)[i]
    
    try({
      # Test significance
      test_result <- anova(model, permutations = 999)
      
      # Get R²
      r2_result <- RsquareAdj(model)
      
      # Store results
      results$R2[i] <- round(r2_result$r.squared, 4)
      results$Adj_R2[i] <- round(r2_result$adj.r.squared, 4)
      results$F_statistic[i] <- round(test_result$F[1], 2)
      results$p_value[i] <- test_result$`Pr(>F)`[1]
      
      cat(sprintf("  %-25s: R² = %.3f, F = %.2f, p = %.3f\n", 
                  analysis_name, r2_result$r.squared, test_result$F[1], test_result$`Pr(>F)`[1]))
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Format p-values and significance
  results$p_formatted <- ifelse(results$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", 
                               sprintf("%.3f", results$p_value))
  
  results$significance <- case_when(
    results$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
    results$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
    results$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
    results$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
    TRUE ~ ""
  )
  
  return(list(results = results, models = analyses, metadata = metadata, community = community_data))
}

```

# Run dbRDA
```{r run dbRDA}
# =============== RUN MOTILE ANALYSIS ===============

cat("\n\nRunning dbRDA analysis on motile 2mm order data...\n")

motile_analysis <- run_motile_dbrda(
  community_data = community_final,
  metadata = metadata_final,
  dataset_name = "Motile_2mm_Orders"
)

# Extract results
if (!is.null(motile_analysis)) {
  motile_results <- motile_analysis$results
  motile_models <- motile_analysis$models
  
  # Display results
  cat("\n\nMOTILE 2MM dbRDA RESULTS\n")
  cat("========================\n")
  print(motile_results)
  
} else {
  stop("Analysis failed - check data structure and variable names")
}

# ================= RESULTS INTERPRETATION =================


cat("\n\nRESULTS INTERPRETATION\n")
cat("======================\n")

if (exists("motile_results")) {
  
  # 1. Environmental vs Spatial comparison
  env_spatial_comparison <- motile_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% c("environmental", "spatial")) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, p_value) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Analysis, values_from = c(R2, p_value)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Environmental_stronger = R2_environmental > R2_spatial,
      Effect_difference = abs(R2_environmental - R2_spatial),
      Interpretation = dplyr::case_when(
        R2_environmental > R2_spatial & p_value_environmental < 0.05 ~ "Environmental > Spatial",
        R2_spatial > R2_environmental & p_value_spatial < 0.05 ~ "Spatial > Environmental", 
        TRUE ~ "Similar effects"
      )
    )
  
  cat("\n1. ENVIRONMENTAL vs SPATIAL EFFECTS (Motile Organisms):\n")
  if (nrow(env_spatial_comparison) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("Environmental R² = %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", 
                env_spatial_comparison$R2_environmental, env_spatial_comparison$p_value_environmental))
    cat(sprintf("Spatial R² = %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", 
                env_spatial_comparison$R2_spatial, env_spatial_comparison$p_value_spatial))
    cat("Winner:", env_spatial_comparison$Interpretation, "\n")
  }
  
  # 2. Individual environmental drivers
  individual_env <- motile_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone")) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, p_value) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(R2))
  
  cat("\n2. INDIVIDUAL ENVIRONMENTAL DRIVERS:\n")
  print(individual_env)
  
  # 3. Individual spatial drivers
  individual_spatial <- motile_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% c("latitude_alone", "longitude_alone")) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, p_value) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(R2))
  
  cat("\n3. INDIVIDUAL SPATIAL DRIVERS:\n")
  print(individual_spatial)
  
  # 4. Conditional tests
  conditional_results <- motile_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(grepl("after|conditional", Analysis)) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, p_value, significance)
  
  cat("\n4. CONDITIONAL TESTS (Mechanistic insights):\n")
  print(conditional_results)
  
  # 5. Site effects comparison (FIXED)
  site_effects <- motile_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis == "site_only") %>%
    dplyr::select(R2, p_value)
  
  if (nrow(site_effects) > 0) {
    cat("\n5. SITE EFFECTS:\n")
    cat(sprintf("Site identity R² = %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", site_effects$R2, site_effects$p_value))
    cat("→ Represents maximum possible local-scale differentiation\n")
  }
}
```
```{r}
# =============== CREATE TABLE FOR 2MM BARCODED MACROFAUNA ===============

# Function to extract ANOVA by terms for table
extract_anova_table_2mm <- function(model, model_type) {
  
  # Run ANOVA by terms (sequential test)
  anova_terms <- anova(model, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
  
  # Extract into dataframe matching your table structure
  terms_df <- data.frame(
    Model_Type = model_type,
    Term = rownames(anova_terms),
    Df = anova_terms$Df,
    SumOfSqs = round(anova_terms$SumOfSqs, 4),
    F_statistic = round(anova_terms$F, 4),
    P_Value = anova_terms$`Pr(>F)`,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  return(terms_df)
}

# ============ RUN MODELS AND EXTRACT RESULTS ============

# Initialize list to store results
table_results_2mm <- list()

# 1. Environmental model
if ("environmental" %in% names(motile_models)) {
  cat("\nRunning Environmental model...\n")
  table_results_2mm[["environmental"]] <- extract_anova_table_2mm(
    motile_models$environmental,
    "Environmental"
  )
}

# 2. Spatial model
if ("spatial" %in% names(motile_models)) {
  cat("Running Spatial model...\n")
  table_results_2mm[["spatial"]] <- extract_anova_table_2mm(
    motile_models$spatial,
    "Spatial"
  )
}

# 3. Combined model
if ("env_spatial_combined" %in% names(motile_models)) {
  cat("Running Combined model...\n")
  table_results_2mm[["combined"]] <- extract_anova_table_2mm(
    motile_models$env_spatial_combined,
    "Combined"
  )
}

# ============ COMBINE INTO SINGLE TABLE ============

macrofauna_2mm_table <- bind_rows(table_results_2mm)

# Add sample grouping column
macrofauna_2mm_table <- macrofauna_2mm_table %>%
  mutate(Sample_Group = "all_samples", .before = Model_Type)

# Display the table
cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("2mm BARCODED MACROFAUNA - ANOVA BY TERMS TABLE\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

print(macrofauna_2mm_table)

# ============ FORMAT FOR EXCEL/PUBLICATION ============

# Create a cleaner version with formatted p-values
macrofauna_2mm_table_formatted <- macrofauna_2mm_table %>%
  mutate(
    P_Value_formatted = case_when(
      is.na(P_Value) ~ "",
      P_Value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
      TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", P_Value)
    ),
    Significance = case_when(
      is.na(P_Value) ~ "",
      P_Value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      P_Value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      P_Value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      P_Value < 0.1 ~ ".",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  )

# Display formatted version
cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("FORMATTED VERSION WITH SIGNIFICANCE\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

print(macrofauna_2mm_table_formatted %>%
  select(Sample_Group, Model_Type, Term, Df, SumOfSqs, F_statistic, 
         P_Value_formatted, Significance))

# ============ SAVE TO CSV ============

write.csv(macrofauna_2mm_table, 
          "2mm_barcoded_macrofauna_anova_table.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(macrofauna_2mm_table_formatted, 
          "2mm_barcoded_macrofauna_anova_table_formatted.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n✓ Tables saved to:\n")
cat("  - 2mm_barcoded_macrofauna_anova_table.csv\n")
cat("  - 2mm_barcoded_macrofauna_anova_table_formatted.csv\n")

# ============ CREATE SUMMARY STATISTICS ============

summary_2mm <- macrofauna_2mm_table %>%
  filter(Term != "Residual") %>%
  group_by(Model_Type) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Explained_SS = sum(SumOfSqs, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean_F = mean(F_statistic, na.rm = TRUE),
    Significant_Terms = sum(P_Value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    Total_Terms = n()
  )

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("MODEL SUMMARY STATISTICS\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 80), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

print(summary_2mm)
```

# Create biplots
```{r create biplots}
# =================== CREATE BIPLOTS FOR MOTILE DATA ====================

cat("\n\nCreating dbRDA biplots for motile organisms...\n")

create_motile_biplot <- function(model, model_name, metadata) {
  
  cat("Creating biplot for:", model_name, "\n")
  
  # Extract site scores
  site_scores <- scores(model, display = "sites")
  
  # Handle single vs multiple axes
  if (is.vector(site_scores)) {
    site_df <- data.frame(
      dbRDA1 = site_scores,
      dbRDA2 = 0,
      sample = names(site_scores),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else if (ncol(site_scores) == 1) {
    site_df <- data.frame(
      dbRDA1 = site_scores[, 1],
      dbRDA2 = 0,
      sample = rownames(site_scores),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    site_df <- data.frame(
      dbRDA1 = site_scores[, 1],
      dbRDA2 = site_scores[, 2],
      sample = rownames(site_scores),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Add metadata
  metadata_df <- data.frame(
    sample = rownames(metadata),
    depth = metadata$depth,
    sitelocality = metadata$sitelocality,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Merge
  site_df$depth <- metadata_df$depth[match(site_df$sample, metadata_df$sample)]
  site_df$sitelocality <- metadata_df$sitelocality[match(site_df$sample, metadata_df$sample)]
  
  # Extract environmental vectors
  env_df <- NULL
  try({
    env_scores <- scores(model, display = "bp")
    if (!is.null(env_scores) && length(env_scores) > 0) {
      if (is.vector(env_scores)) {
        env_df <- data.frame(
          variable = names(env_scores),
          dbRDA1 = env_scores,
          dbRDA2 = 0,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      } else if (ncol(site_scores) == 1) {
        env_df <- data.frame(
          variable = rownames(env_scores),
          dbRDA1 = env_scores[, 1],
          dbRDA2 = 0,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      } else {
        env_df <- data.frame(
          variable = rownames(env_scores),
          dbRDA1 = env_scores[, 1],
          dbRDA2 = if(ncol(env_scores) > 1) env_scores[, 2] else 0,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }
      
      # Clean variable names for plotting
      env_df$variable_clean <- case_when(
        env_df$variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
        env_df$variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
        env_df$variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
        env_df$variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
        env_df$variable == "pp_mean" ~ "Productivity",
        TRUE ~ env_df$variable
      )
    }
  }, silent = TRUE)  
  # Calculate variance explained
  eigenvals <- eigenvals(model)
  if (length(eigenvals) >= 2) {
    axis1_var <- round((eigenvals[1] / sum(eigenvals)) * 100, 1)
    axis2_var <- round((eigenvals[2] / sum(eigenvals)) * 100, 1)
  } else {
    axis1_var <- round((eigenvals[1] / sum(eigenvals)) * 100, 1)
    axis2_var <- 0
  }
  
  # Calculate total R²
  r2_total <- round(RsquareAdj(model)$r.squared, 3)
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(site_df, aes(x = dbRDA1, y = dbRDA2)) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = sitelocality), size = 7, shape = 21, alpha = 0.9, stroke = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = motile_site_colors, name = "Site") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.3) +
    labs(
      x = paste0("dbRDA1 (", axis1_var, "%)"),
      y = paste0("dbRDA2 (", axis2_var, "%)"),
      title = paste("Motile 2mm dbRDA:", model_name),
      subtitle = paste0("R² = ", r2_total)
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      legend.title = element_text(size=20, color = "black"),
      legend.text = element_text(size=18, color = "black"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, color = "black", face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5)
    )
  
  # Add environmental vectors if available
  if (!is.null(env_df) && nrow(env_df) > 0) {
    cat("Adding", nrow(env_df), "environmental vectors\n")
    arrow_scale <- max(abs(c(site_df$dbRDA1, site_df$dbRDA2)), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.7
    
    p <- p +
      geom_segment(data = env_df, 
                   aes(x = 0, y = 0, 
                       xend = dbRDA1 * arrow_scale, 
                       yend = dbRDA2 * arrow_scale),
                   arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")), 
                   color = "#E31A1C", linewidth = 1.5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      geom_text(data = env_df,
                aes(x = dbRDA1 * arrow_scale * 1.15, 
                    y = dbRDA2 * arrow_scale * 1.15, 
                    label = variable_clean),
                color = "#E31A1C", size = 6, fontface = "bold", 
                inherit.aes = FALSE)
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create plots for key models
plot_list <- list()

if (exists("motile_models")) {
  
  cat("Creating plots for", length(motile_models), "models...\n")
  
  # Environmental model
  if ("full_environmental" %in% names(edna_dbrda_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list_edna[["environmental"]] <- create_edna_biplot(
        edna_dbrda_models[["full_environmental"]], 
        "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity + Productivity)",  # <- 3 vectors
        env_data_dbrda_edna
      )
    })
  }
  
  # Spatial model
  if ("spatial" %in% names(motile_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list[["spatial"]] <- create_motile_biplot(
        motile_models[["spatial"]], 
        "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)",
        metadata_final
      )
    })
  }
  
  # Combined model
  if ("env_spatial_combined" %in% names(motile_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list[["combined"]] <- create_motile_biplot(
        motile_models[["env_spatial_combined"]], 
        "Combined (Environmental + Spatial)",
        metadata_final
      )
    })
  }
  
  # Individual drivers
  if ("depth_alone" %in% names(motile_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list[["depth_alone"]] <- create_motile_biplot(
        motile_models[["depth_alone"]], 
        "Depth Only",
        metadata_final
      )
    })
  }
  
  if ("turbidity_alone" %in% names(motile_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list[["turbidity_alone"]] <- create_motile_biplot(
        motile_models[["turbidity_alone"]], 
        "Turbidity Only", 
        metadata_final
      )
    })
  }
  
  # Site effects
  if ("site_only" %in% names(motile_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list[["site_only"]] <- create_motile_biplot(
        motile_models[["site_only"]], 
        "Site Effects Only", 
        metadata_final
      )
    })
  }
```

# Save dbRDA results and plots
```{r save dbRDA results and plots}
# =========== SAVE RESULTS AND PLOTS ================
# Save results table
results_file <- file.path(output_dir, "motile_2mm_dbRDA_results.csv")
  write.csv(motile_results, results_file, row.names = FALSE)

# Save individual plots
if (length(plot_list) > 0) {
  for (plot_name in names(plot_list)) {
    plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("motile_2mm_", plot_name, "_dbRDA.pdf"))
    try({
      ggsave(
        filename = plot_file, 
        plot = plot_list[[plot_name]], 
        width = 10, height = 8, 
        dpi = 300
      )
      cat("✓ Saved:", plot_name, "plot\n")
    })
  }
}

# Create multi-panel figure
if (length(plot_list) >= 3) {
  # Main comparison panel (Environmental vs Spatial vs Combined)
  main_plots <- plot_list[c("environmental", "spatial", "combined")]
  if (length(main_plots) == 3) {
    
    # Create temporary plot with legend for extraction
    temp_plot_with_legend <- main_plots[[1]] + theme(legend.position = "right")
    
    # Extract legend
    legend <- cowplot::get_legend(temp_plot_with_legend)
    
    # Create panel with plots
    plot_panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = main_plots, ncol = 3)
    
    # Combine plots with shared legend
    main_panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(plot_panel, legend, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(3, 0.4))
    
    # Add title
    main_panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(
      cowplot::ggdraw() + cowplot::draw_label("Motile 2mm Orders dbRDA: Environmental vs Spatial Drivers", 
                                             fontface = "bold", size = 16),
      main_panel,
      ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.1, 1)
    )
    
    main_file <- file.path("./Output_2mm/motile_2mm_main_comparison_dbRDA.pdf")
    ggsave(main_file, plot = main_panel, width = 20, height = 7, dpi = 300)
    cat("✓ Main comparison panel saved\n")
  }
}

# ============= FINAL SUMMARY ============

cat("\n\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("MOTILE 2MM dbRDA ANALYSIS COMPLETE\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")

if (exists("motile_results")) {
  cat("\nKEY FINDINGS FOR MOTILE ORGANISMS:\n")
  
  # Environmental vs spatial (if both exist)
  env_result <- motile_results[motile_results$Analysis == "environmental", ]
  spatial_result <- motile_results[motile_results$Analysis == "spatial", ]
  
  if (nrow(env_result) > 0 && nrow(spatial_result) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("1. Environmental effects: R² = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", 
                env_result$R2, env_result$p_value, env_result$significance))
    cat(sprintf("2. Spatial effects: R² = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", 
                spatial_result$R2, spatial_result$p_value, spatial_result$significance))
    
    if (env_result$R2 > spatial_result$R2) {
      cat("→ Environmental factors dominate motile community structure\n")
    } else {
      cat("→ Spatial factors dominate motile community structure\n")
    }
  }
  
  # Site effects
  site_result <- motile_results[motile_results$Analysis == "site_only", ]
  if (nrow(site_result) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("3. Site identity effects: R² = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", 
                site_result$R2, site_result$p_value, site_result$significance))
    cat("→ Represents fine-scale habitat heterogeneity\n")
  }
}

cat("\n✓ All results and plots saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("✓ Analysis framework consistent with PERMANOVA and PCoA\n")
cat("✓ Results comparable to sessile CoralNet communities\n")

cat("\nMOTILE ORGANISM HYPOTHESIS ASSESSMENT:\n")
cat("- Environmental independence due to mobility\n") 
cat("- Weak environmental control vs strong site effects\n")
cat("- Spatial patterns reflect dispersal or unmeasured factors\n")
cat("- Biplots show variable relationships with order-level communities\n")
```


# COMPREHENSIVE dbRDA SUMMARY EXCEL FILE TABLE EXPORT 
```{r comprehensive excel export}

# Explicitly handle namespace conflicts
if("dplyr" %in% (.packages())) {
  cat("dplyr loaded successfully\n")
} else {
  library(dplyr)
  cat("dplyr loaded\n")
}

# Function to create comprehensive dbRDA summary table
create_dbrda_summary_table <- function(analysis_results, output_file = "motile_2mm_dbRDA_summary.xlsx") {
  
  cat("Creating comprehensive dbRDA summary table...\n")
  
  # Extract components
  results <- analysis_results$results
  models <- analysis_results$models
  metadata <- analysis_results$metadata
  community <- analysis_results$community
  
  # ============= PANEL A: VARIANCE PARTITIONING SUMMARY ==============
  
  cat("Creating Panel A: Variance Partitioning Summary...\n")
  
  # Key models for variance partitioning
  key_analyses <- c("environmental", "spatial", "env_spatial_combined", "site_only")
  
  panel_a <- results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% key_analyses) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, Adj_R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Adj_Variance_Percent = round(Adj_R2 * 100, 1),
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999,
      Sample_Size = nrow(community),
      Num_Orders = ncol(community)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(match(Analysis, key_analyses))
  
  # Calculate residual variance
  max_explained <- max(panel_a$Variance_Percent, na.rm = TRUE)
  residual_variance <- 100 - max_explained
  
  # Add residual row
  residual_row <- data.frame(
    Analysis = "residual",
    R2 = residual_variance/100,
    Adj_R2 = NA,
    F_statistic = NA,
    p_value = NA,
    significance = "",
    Variance_Percent = residual_variance,
    Adj_Variance_Percent = NA,
    p_value_formatted = "N/A",
    Test_Method = "N/A",
    Permutations = NA,
    Sample_Size = nrow(community),
    Num_Orders = ncol(community)
  )
  
  panel_a <- rbind(panel_a, residual_row)
  
  # Clean up analysis names
  panel_a$Analysis_Name <- case_when(
    panel_a$Analysis == "environmental" ~ "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)",
    panel_a$Analysis == "spatial" ~ "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)", 
    panel_a$Analysis == "env_spatial_combined" ~ "Environmental + Spatial Combined",
    panel_a$Analysis == "site_only" ~ "Site Identity Effects",
    panel_a$Analysis == "residual" ~ "Residual (Unexplained)",
    TRUE ~ panel_a$Analysis
  )
  
  # ============== PANEL B: INDIVIDUAL ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE CONTRIBUTIONS ================
  
  cat("Creating Panel B: Individual Variable Contributions...\n")
  
  # Marginal effects (variables alone)
  marginal_analyses <- c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone", "latitude_alone", "longitude_alone")
  
  marginal_effects <- results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% marginal_analyses) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "depth_alone" ~ "Depth",
        Analysis == "turbidity_alone" ~ "Turbidity",
        Analysis == "latitude_alone" ~ "Latitude", 
        Analysis == "longitude_alone" ~ "Longitude",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Marginal_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Marginal"
    )
  
  # Conditional effects (variables added last)
  conditional_analyses <- c("turbidity_after_depth", "spatial_after_env")
  
  conditional_effects <- results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% conditional_analyses) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "turbidity_after_depth" ~ "Turbidity|Depth",
        Analysis == "spatial_after_env" ~ "Spatial|Environmental",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Conditional_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Conditional"
    )
  
  # Combine marginal and conditional
  panel_b <- dplyr::full_join(
    marginal_effects %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Marginal_Variance_Percent, F_statistic, p_value, significance),
    conditional_effects %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Conditional_Variance_Percent),
    by = "Variable"
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        is.na(p_value) ~ "N/A",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Degrees_Freedom = 1,  # Assuming single variables
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999
    )
  
  # ============= PANEL C: dbRDA AXIS INFORMATION ===============
  
  cat("Creating Panel C: dbRDA Axis Information...\n")
  
  # Extract axis information from main environmental model
  panel_c <- data.frame()
  
  if ("environmental" %in% names(models)) {
    model <- models[["environmental"]]
    eigenvals <- eigenvals(model)
    total_inertia <- sum(eigenvals)
    
    # Create axis summary
    for (i in 1:min(length(eigenvals), 4)) {  # Up to 4 axes
      axis_row <- data.frame(
        Axis = paste0("dbRDA", i),
        Eigenvalue = round(eigenvals[i], 4),
        Variance_Percent = round((eigenvals[i] / total_inertia) * 100, 1),
        Cumulative_Percent = round((sum(eigenvals[1:i]) / total_inertia) * 100, 1)
      )
      panel_c <- rbind(panel_c, axis_row)
    }
    
    # Add axis significance (if available)
    try({
      axis_test <- anova(model, by = "axis", permutations = 999)
      if (nrow(axis_test) >= nrow(panel_c)) {
        panel_c$F_statistic <- round(axis_test$F[1:nrow(panel_c)], 2)
        panel_c$p_value <- axis_test$`Pr(>F)`[1:nrow(panel_c)]
        panel_c$p_value_formatted <- case_when(
          panel_c$p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
          is.na(panel_c$p_value) ~ "N/A",
          TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", panel_c$p_value)
        )
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ============ PANEL D: ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE LOADINGS =============
  
  cat("Creating Panel D: Environmental Variable Loadings...\n")
  
  panel_d <- data.frame()
  
  if ("environmental" %in% names(models)) {
    model <- models[["environmental"]]
    
    try({
      # Extract biplot scores (environmental loadings)
      bp_scores <- scores(model, display = "bp")
      
      if (!is.null(bp_scores) && length(bp_scores) > 0) {
        
        if (is.vector(bp_scores)) {
          panel_d <- data.frame(
            Variable = names(bp_scores),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores,
            dbRDA2_loading = 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        } else {
          panel_d <- data.frame(
            Variable = rownames(bp_scores),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores[, 1],
            dbRDA2_loading = if(ncol(bp_scores) > 1) bp_scores[, 2] else 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        }
        
        # Calculate vector length (correlation strength)
        panel_d$Vector_Length <- sqrt(panel_d$dbRDA1_loading^2 + panel_d$dbRDA2_loading^2)
        
        # Clean variable names
        panel_d$Variable_Name <- case_when(
          panel_d$Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
          panel_d$Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
          panel_d$Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
          panel_d$Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
          panel_d$Variable == "PP_mean" ~ "Productivity",
          TRUE ~ panel_d$Variable
        )
        
        # Round values
        panel_d$dbRDA1_loading <- round(panel_d$dbRDA1_loading, 3)
        panel_d$dbRDA2_loading <- round(panel_d$dbRDA2_loading, 3)
        panel_d$Vector_Length <- round(panel_d$Vector_Length, 3)
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ============= PANEL E: MODEL SELECTION RESULTS ==============
  
  cat("Creating Panel E: Model Selection Results...\n")
  
  # Create placeholder for model selection (can be expanded if forward selection is implemented)
  panel_e <- data.frame(
    Selection_Step = c("Step 1", "Step 2", "Step 3", "Final Model"),
    Variable_Added = c("Depth", "Turbidity", "Spatial", "All significant"),
    AIC = c(NA, NA, NA, NA),  # Would need to implement AIC calculation
    BIC = c(NA, NA, NA, NA),  # Would need to implement BIC calculation
    R2_Cumulative = c(NA, NA, NA, NA),
    p_value = c(NA, NA, NA, NA),
    Selection_Method = "Manual selection",
    Notes = c("Most important environmental factor", 
              "Additional environmental factor",
              "Spatial component", 
              "Final combined model")
  )
  
  # ============== EXPORT TO EXCEL =================
  
  cat("Exporting to Excel file:", output_file, "\n")
  
  # Create workbook
  wb <- createWorkbook()
  
  # Define styles
  header_style <- createStyle(
    fontName = "Arial",
    fontSize = 12,
    fontColour = "white",
    fgFill = "#1f4e79",
    textDecoration = "bold",
    halign = "center",
    valign = "center",
    border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
    borderColour = "black"
  )
  
  data_style <- createStyle(
    fontName = "Arial", 
    fontSize = 10,
    halign = "center",
    valign = "center",
    border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
    borderColour = "grey"
  )
  
  # Helper function to safely apply styles
  safe_addStyle <- function(wb, sheet, style, start_row, end_row, start_col, end_col) {
    if (end_row >= start_row && end_col >= start_col) {
      for (row in start_row:end_row) {
        for (col in start_col:end_col) {
          addStyle(wb, sheet, style, rows = row, cols = col)
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Add worksheets and data
  
  # Panel A
  addWorksheet(wb, "A_Variance_Partitioning")
  writeData(wb, "A_Variance_Partitioning", panel_a)
  # Apply header style
  for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a)) {
    addStyle(wb, "A_Variance_Partitioning", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  # Apply data style
  if (nrow(panel_a) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_a)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a)) {
        addStyle(wb, "A_Variance_Partitioning", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel B
  addWorksheet(wb, "B_Individual_Variables")
  writeData(wb, "B_Individual_Variables", panel_b)
  # Apply header style
  for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b)) {
    addStyle(wb, "B_Individual_Variables", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  # Apply data style
  if (nrow(panel_b) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_b)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b)) {
        addStyle(wb, "B_Individual_Variables", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel C
  if (nrow(panel_c) > 0) {
    addWorksheet(wb, "C_Axis_Information")
    writeData(wb, "C_Axis_Information", panel_c)
    # Apply header style
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c)) {
      addStyle(wb, "C_Axis_Information", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    # Apply data style
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_c)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c)) {
        addStyle(wb, "C_Axis_Information", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel D
  if (nrow(panel_d) > 0) {
    addWorksheet(wb, "D_Variable_Loadings")
    writeData(wb, "D_Variable_Loadings", panel_d)
    # Apply header style
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d)) {
      addStyle(wb, "D_Variable_Loadings", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    # Apply data style
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_d)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d)) {
        addStyle(wb, "D_Variable_Loadings", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel E
  addWorksheet(wb, "E_Model_Selection")
  writeData(wb, "E_Model_Selection", panel_e)
  # Apply header style
  for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e)) {
    addStyle(wb, "E_Model_Selection", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  # Apply data style
  if (nrow(panel_e) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_e)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e)) {
        addStyle(wb, "E_Model_Selection", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Summary sheet
  summary_info <- data.frame(
    Metric = c("Analysis Type", "Dataset", "Sample Size", "Number of Orders", 
               "Distance Method", "Permutations", "Significance Levels"),
    Value = c("Distance-based Redundancy Analysis (dbRDA)", 
              "Motile 2mm Communities",
              nrow(community), 
              ncol(community),
              "Bray-Curtis", 
              "999", 
              "*** p<0.001, ** p<0.01, * p<0.05"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  addWorksheet(wb, "Summary")
  writeData(wb, "Summary", summary_info)
  # Apply header style
  for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info)) {
    addStyle(wb, "Summary", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  # Apply data style
  if (nrow(summary_info) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(summary_info)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info)) {
        addStyle(wb, "Summary", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Auto-size columns
  for (sheet in names(wb)) {
    setColWidths(wb, sheet, cols = 1:20, widths = "auto")
  }
  
  # Save workbook
  saveWorkbook(wb, output_file, overwrite = TRUE)
  
  cat("✓ Excel file saved successfully!\n")
  cat("✓ Sheets created:", paste(names(wb), collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  # Return list of all panels for inspection
  return(list(
    panel_a = panel_a,
    panel_b = panel_b, 
    panel_c = panel_c,
    panel_d = panel_d,
    panel_e = panel_e,
    summary = summary_info,
    file_path = output_file
  ))
}

# =============== EXECUTE THE EXPORT ================

# Run the export function (assumes motile_analysis exists from your previous code)
if (exists("motile_analysis")) {
  
  cat("Creating comprehensive dbRDA summary table...\n")
  
  # Create the summary table
  summary_export <- create_dbrda_summary_table(
    analysis_results = motile_analysis,
    output_file = file.path(output_dir, "Table_S1_Motile_2mm_dbRDA_Summary.xlsx")
  )
  
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat("EXPORT COMPLETE\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  cat("File saved as:", summary_export$file_path, "\n")
  cat("Panels included:\n")
  cat("  A. Variance Partitioning Summary\n")
  cat("  B. Individual Variable Contributions\n") 
  cat("  C. dbRDA Axis Information\n")
  cat("  D. Environmental Variable Loadings\n")
  cat("  E. Model Selection Results\n")
  cat("  Summary: Analysis metadata\n")
  
  # Display preview of Panel A
  cat("\nPreview of Panel A (Variance Partitioning):\n")
  print(summary_export$panel_a %>% 
        dplyr::select(Analysis_Name, Variance_Percent, p_value_formatted, significance) %>%
        head())
  
} else {
  cat("Error: motile_analysis object not found. Please run the dbRDA analysis first.\n")
}

# ================== OPTIONAL: CREATE PUBLICATION-READY TABLE ===============

# Function to create a clean publication table
create_publication_table <- function(summary_export) {
  
  # Extract key results for publication
  pub_table <- summary_export$panel_a %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis != "residual") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      `Variance Component` = Analysis_Name,
      `R² (%)` = paste0(Variance_Percent, "%"),
      `F-statistic` = F_statistic,
      `p-value` = paste0(p_value_formatted, " ", significance),
      `Sample size` = Sample_Size,
      `Orders` = Num_Orders
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(`Variance Component`, `R² (%)`, `F-statistic`, `p-value`)
  
  return(pub_table)
}

# Create publication version
if (exists("summary_export")) {
  pub_table <- create_publication_table(summary_export)
  
  cat("\nPublication-ready table:\n")
  print(pub_table)
  
  # Save as CSV for easy copying to manuscripts
  write.csv(pub_table, 
            file.path(output_dir, "Table_S1_Publication_Ready.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("\n✓ Publication-ready CSV saved\n")
}
```

# Comprehensive Excel File that includes PP_mean
Panels included:
  A. Variance Partitioning (includes productivity_alone & full_model)
  B. Individual Variables (includes PP_mean marginal & conditional)
  C. dbRDA Axis Information (from full_model if available)
  D. Variable Loadings (includes PP_mean vector)
  E. Model Comparison (ranks all models by R²)
```{r}
# COMPREHENSIVE dbRDA SUMMARY EXCEL FILE TABLE EXPORT - WITH PRODUCTIVITY
# =============================================================================
# Function to create comprehensive dbRDA summary table
create_dbrda_summary_table <- function(analysis_results, output_file = "motile_2mm_dbRDA_summary.xlsx") {
  
  cat("Creating comprehensive dbRDA summary table...\n")
  
  # Extract components
  results <- analysis_results$results
  models <- analysis_results$models
  metadata <- analysis_results$metadata
  community <- analysis_results$community
  
  # Check if productivity was included in analysis
  has_productivity <- "productivity_alone" %in% results$Analysis
  
  if (has_productivity) {
    cat("✓ Productivity data detected in analysis\n")
  } else {
    cat("⚠ Warning: Productivity not found in analysis results\n")
  }
  
  # ============= PANEL A: VARIANCE PARTITIONING SUMMARY ==============
  
  cat("Creating Panel A: Variance Partitioning Summary...\n")
  
  # Key models for variance partitioning (INCLUDING PRODUCTIVITY)
  key_analyses <- c("environmental", "spatial", "env_spatial_combined", 
                   "productivity_alone", "full_model", "site_only")
  
  panel_a <- results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% key_analyses) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, Adj_R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Adj_Variance_Percent = round(Adj_R2 * 100, 1),
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999,
      Sample_Size = nrow(community),
      Num_Orders = ncol(community)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(match(Analysis, key_analyses))
  
  # Calculate residual variance based on full model if available, otherwise env_spatial
  if ("full_model" %in% panel_a$Analysis) {
    max_explained <- panel_a$Variance_Percent[panel_a$Analysis == "full_model"]
  } else {
    max_explained <- max(panel_a$Variance_Percent, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  residual_variance <- 100 - max_explained
  
  # Add residual row
  residual_row <- data.frame(
    Analysis = "residual",
    R2 = residual_variance/100,
    Adj_R2 = NA,
    F_statistic = NA,
    p_value = NA,
    significance = "",
    Variance_Percent = residual_variance,
    Adj_Variance_Percent = NA,
    p_value_formatted = "N/A",
    Test_Method = "N/A",
    Permutations = NA,
    Sample_Size = nrow(community),
    Num_Orders = ncol(community)
  )
  
  panel_a <- rbind(panel_a, residual_row)
  
  # Clean up analysis names
  panel_a$Analysis_Name <- case_when(
    panel_a$Analysis == "environmental" ~ "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)",
    panel_a$Analysis == "spatial" ~ "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)", 
    panel_a$Analysis == "env_spatial_combined" ~ "Environmental + Spatial Combined",
    panel_a$Analysis == "productivity_alone" ~ "Productivity (PP_mean)",
    panel_a$Analysis == "full_model" ~ "Full Model (Env + Spatial + Productivity)",
    panel_a$Analysis == "site_only" ~ "Site Identity Effects",
    panel_a$Analysis == "residual" ~ "Residual (Unexplained)",
    TRUE ~ panel_a$Analysis
  )
  
  # ============== PANEL B: INDIVIDUAL VARIABLE CONTRIBUTIONS ================
  
  cat("Creating Panel B: Individual Variable Contributions...\n")
  
  # Marginal effects (variables alone) - INCLUDING PRODUCTIVITY
  marginal_analyses <- c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone", "latitude_alone", 
                        "longitude_alone", "productivity_alone")
  
  marginal_effects <- results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% marginal_analyses) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "depth_alone" ~ "Depth",
        Analysis == "turbidity_alone" ~ "Turbidity",
        Analysis == "latitude_alone" ~ "Latitude", 
        Analysis == "longitude_alone" ~ "Longitude",
        Analysis == "productivity_alone" ~ "Productivity (PP_mean)",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Marginal_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Marginal"
    )
  
  # Conditional effects (variables added last) - INCLUDING PRODUCTIVITY CONDITIONAL
  conditional_analyses <- c("turbidity_after_depth", "spatial_after_env", 
                           "longitude_after_productivity")
  
  conditional_effects <- results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% conditional_analyses) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value, significance) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "turbidity_after_depth" ~ "Turbidity|Depth",
        Analysis == "spatial_after_env" ~ "Spatial|Environmental",
        Analysis == "longitude_after_productivity" ~ "Longitude|Productivity",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      Conditional_Variance_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Effect_Type = "Conditional"
    )
  
  # Combine marginal and conditional
  panel_b <- dplyr::full_join(
    marginal_effects %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Marginal_Variance_Percent, F_statistic, p_value, significance),
    conditional_effects %>% dplyr::select(Variable, Conditional_Variance_Percent),
    by = "Variable"
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        is.na(p_value) ~ "N/A",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      ),
      Degrees_Freedom = 1,
      Test_Method = "Permutation F-test",
      Permutations = 999
    )
  
  # ============= PANEL C: dbRDA AXIS INFORMATION ===============
  
  cat("Creating Panel C: dbRDA Axis Information...\n")
  
  # Extract axis information from FULL MODEL if available, otherwise environmental
  panel_c <- data.frame()
  
  model_choice <- if ("full_model" %in% names(models)) {
    cat("Using full_model (with productivity) for axis information\n")
    "full_model"
  } else if ("environmental" %in% names(models)) {
    cat("Using environmental model for axis information\n")
    "environmental"
  } else {
    NULL
  }
  
  if (!is.null(model_choice)) {
    model <- models[[model_choice]]
    eigenvals <- eigenvals(model)
    total_inertia <- sum(eigenvals)
    
    # Create axis summary
    for (i in 1:min(length(eigenvals), 4)) {
      axis_row <- data.frame(
        Axis = paste0("dbRDA", i),
        Eigenvalue = round(eigenvals[i], 4),
        Variance_Percent = round((eigenvals[i] / total_inertia) * 100, 1),
        Cumulative_Percent = round((sum(eigenvals[1:i]) / total_inertia) * 100, 1),
        Model_Used = model_choice
      )
      panel_c <- rbind(panel_c, axis_row)
    }
    
    # Add axis significance
    try({
      axis_test <- anova(model, by = "axis", permutations = 999)
      if (nrow(axis_test) >= nrow(panel_c)) {
        panel_c$F_statistic <- round(axis_test$F[1:nrow(panel_c)], 2)
        panel_c$p_value <- axis_test$`Pr(>F)`[1:nrow(panel_c)]
        panel_c$p_value_formatted <- case_when(
          panel_c$p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
          is.na(panel_c$p_value) ~ "N/A",
          TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", panel_c$p_value)
        )
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ============ PANEL D: ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE LOADINGS =============
  
  cat("Creating Panel D: Environmental Variable Loadings...\n")
  
  panel_d <- data.frame()
  
  # Use full model if available for loadings
  if (!is.null(model_choice)) {
    model <- models[[model_choice]]
    
    try({
      # Extract biplot scores (environmental loadings)
      bp_scores <- scores(model, display = "bp")
      
      if (!is.null(bp_scores) && length(bp_scores) > 0) {
        
        if (is.vector(bp_scores)) {
          panel_d <- data.frame(
            Variable = names(bp_scores),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores,
            dbRDA2_loading = 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        } else {
          panel_d <- data.frame(
            Variable = rownames(bp_scores),
            dbRDA1_loading = bp_scores[, 1],
            dbRDA2_loading = if(ncol(bp_scores) > 1) bp_scores[, 2] else 0,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        }
        
        # Calculate vector length
        panel_d$Vector_Length <- sqrt(panel_d$dbRDA1_loading^2 + panel_d$dbRDA2_loading^2)
        
        # Clean variable names - INCLUDING PRODUCTIVITY
        panel_d$Variable_Name <- case_when(
          panel_d$Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
          panel_d$Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
          panel_d$Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
          panel_d$Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
          panel_d$Variable == "PP_mean" ~ "Productivity",
          TRUE ~ panel_d$Variable
        )
        
        # Round values
        panel_d$dbRDA1_loading <- round(panel_d$dbRDA1_loading, 3)
        panel_d$dbRDA2_loading <- round(panel_d$dbRDA2_loading, 3)
        panel_d$Vector_Length <- round(panel_d$Vector_Length, 3)
        panel_d$Model_Used <- model_choice
      }
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ============= PANEL E: MODEL COMPARISON ==============
  
  cat("Creating Panel E: Model Comparison...\n")
  
  # Compare all major models
  comparison_models <- c("environmental", "spatial", "productivity_alone", 
                        "env_spatial_combined", "full_model")
  
  panel_e <- results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% comparison_models) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, Adj_R2, F_statistic, p_value) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Model_Name = case_when(
        Analysis == "environmental" ~ "Environmental Only",
        Analysis == "spatial" ~ "Spatial Only",
        Analysis == "productivity_alone" ~ "Productivity Only",
        Analysis == "env_spatial_combined" ~ "Environmental + Spatial",
        Analysis == "full_model" ~ "Full Model (All Variables)",
        TRUE ~ Analysis
      ),
      R2_Percent = round(R2 * 100, 1),
      Adj_R2_Percent = round(Adj_R2 * 100, 1),
      F_statistic = round(F_statistic, 2),
      p_value_formatted = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(R2_Percent)) %>%
    dplyr::select(Model_Name, R2_Percent, Adj_R2_Percent, F_statistic, p_value_formatted)
  
  # ============== EXPORT TO EXCEL =================
  
  cat("Exporting to Excel file:", output_file, "\n")
  
  # Create workbook
  wb <- createWorkbook()
  
  # Define styles
  header_style <- createStyle(
    fontName = "Arial",
    fontSize = 12,
    fontColour = "white",
    fgFill = "#1f4e79",
    textDecoration = "bold",
    halign = "center",
    valign = "center",
    border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
    borderColour = "black"
  )
  
  data_style <- createStyle(
    fontName = "Arial", 
    fontSize = 10,
    halign = "center",
    valign = "center",
    border = "TopBottomLeftRight",
    borderColour = "grey"
  )
  
  # Add worksheets and data
  
  # Panel A
  addWorksheet(wb, "A_Variance_Partitioning")
  writeData(wb, "A_Variance_Partitioning", panel_a)
  for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a)) {
    addStyle(wb, "A_Variance_Partitioning", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  if (nrow(panel_a) > 0) {
```
