```{r}
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_a)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_a)) {
        addStyle(wb, "A_Variance_Partitioning", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel B
  addWorksheet(wb, "B_Individual_Variables")
  writeData(wb, "B_Individual_Variables", panel_b)
  for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b)) {
    addStyle(wb, "B_Individual_Variables", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  if (nrow(panel_b) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_b)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_b)) {
        addStyle(wb, "B_Individual_Variables", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel C
  if (nrow(panel_c) > 0) {
    addWorksheet(wb, "C_Axis_Information")
    writeData(wb, "C_Axis_Information", panel_c)
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c)) {
      addStyle(wb, "C_Axis_Information", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_c)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_c)) {
        addStyle(wb, "C_Axis_Information", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel D
  if (nrow(panel_d) > 0) {
    addWorksheet(wb, "D_Variable_Loadings")
    writeData(wb, "D_Variable_Loadings", panel_d)
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d)) {
      addStyle(wb, "D_Variable_Loadings", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_d)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_d)) {
        addStyle(wb, "D_Variable_Loadings", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Panel E
  if (nrow(panel_e) > 0) {
    addWorksheet(wb, "E_Model_Comparison")
    writeData(wb, "E_Model_Comparison", panel_e)
    for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e)) {
      addStyle(wb, "E_Model_Comparison", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
    }
    for (row in 2:(nrow(panel_e)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(panel_e)) {
        addStyle(wb, "E_Model_Comparison", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Summary sheet
  summary_info <- data.frame(
    Metric = c("Analysis Type", "Dataset", "Sample Size", "Number of Orders", 
               "Distance Method", "Transformation", "Permutations", 
               "Productivity Included", "Significance Levels"),
    Value = c("Distance-based Redundancy Analysis (dbRDA)", 
              "Motile 2mm Communities",
              nrow(community), 
              ncol(community),
              "Bray-Curtis", 
              "4th root",
              "999",
              ifelse(has_productivity, "Yes", "No"),
              "*** p<0.001, ** p<0.01, * p<0.05"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  addWorksheet(wb, "Summary")
  writeData(wb, "Summary", summary_info)
  for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info)) {
    addStyle(wb, "Summary", header_style, rows = 1, cols = col)
  }
  if (nrow(summary_info) > 0) {
    for (row in 2:(nrow(summary_info)+1)) {
      for (col in 1:ncol(summary_info)) {
        addStyle(wb, "Summary", data_style, rows = row, cols = col)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Auto-size columns
  for (sheet in names(wb)) {
    setColWidths(wb, sheet, cols = 1:20, widths = "auto")
  }
  
  # Save workbook
  saveWorkbook(wb, output_file, overwrite = TRUE)
  
  cat("✓ Excel file saved successfully!\n")
  cat("✓ Sheets created:", paste(names(wb), collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  if (has_productivity) {
    cat("✓ Productivity results included in all relevant panels\n")
  }
  
  # Return list of all panels
  return(list(
    panel_a = panel_a,
    panel_b = panel_b, 
    panel_c = panel_c,
    panel_d = panel_d,
    panel_e = panel_e,
    summary = summary_info,
    file_path = output_file,
    productivity_included = has_productivity
  ))
}

# =============== EXECUTE THE EXPORT ================

if (exists("motile_analysis")) {
  
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat("Creating comprehensive dbRDA summary with PRODUCTIVITY\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n\n")
  
  # Create the summary table
  summary_export <- create_dbrda_summary_table(
    analysis_results = motile_analysis,
    output_file = file.path(output_dir, "Table_S1_Motile_2mm_dbRDA_Summary_with_Productivity.xlsx")
  )
  
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat("EXPORT COMPLETE\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  cat("\nFile saved as:", summary_export$file_path, "\n")
  cat("\nPanels included:\n")
  cat("  A. Variance Partitioning (includes productivity_alone & full_model)\n")
  cat("  B. Individual Variables (includes PP_mean marginal & conditional)\n") 
  cat("  C. dbRDA Axis Information (from full_model if available)\n")
  cat("  D. Variable Loadings (includes PP_mean vector)\n")
  cat("  E. Model Comparison (ranks all models by R²)\n")
  cat("  Summary: Analysis metadata\n")
  
  # Display preview
  cat("\n--- Preview of Panel A (Variance Partitioning) ---\n")
  print(summary_export$panel_a %>% 
        dplyr::select(Analysis_Name, Variance_Percent, p_value_formatted, significance))
  
  cat("\n--- Preview of Panel B (Individual Variables) ---\n")
  print(summary_export$panel_b %>%
        dplyr::select(Variable, Marginal_Variance_Percent, Conditional_Variance_Percent, p_value_formatted))
  
  if (summary_export$productivity_included) {
    cat("\nPRODUCTIVITY SUCCESSFULLY INCLUDED IN EXPORT\n")
  } else {
    cat("\n⚠ WARNING: Productivity was NOT found in your analysis results\n")
    cat("Make sure PP_mean is in your metadata and models were run successfully\n")
  }
  
} else {
  cat("Error: motile_analysis object not found. Run dbRDA analysis first.\n")
}
```


# -------------- Mantel, Partial Mantel, MRM ----------------
```{r}
# Load required packages
#library(vegan)    # for mantel tests
#library(ecodist)  # for MRM (multiple regression on distance matrices)
#library(ggplot2)
#library(gridExtra)
#library(dplyr)

# DATA PREPARATION
# Use 4th root transformed order counts (consistent with other analyses)
motile_4th_root <- order_counts^(1/4)

# Match samples between community and metadata
common_samples <- intersect(rownames(motile_4th_root), rownames(metadata_2mm))
community_4th_root <- motile_4th_root[common_samples, ]
metadata_2mm <- metadata_2mm[common_samples, ]

cat("Community data:", nrow(community_4th_root), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root), "orders\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_4th_root), rownames(metadata_2mm)), "\n")

# ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLES SETUP

# Select available environmental variables
env_vars_available <- intersect(c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank", "PP_mean"), 
                               colnames(metadata_2mm))

env_vars_mantel <- metadata_2mm %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(env_vars_available)) %>%
  # Remove any samples with NA values
  na.omit()

cat("Environmental variables included:", ncol(env_vars_mantel), "\n")
cat("Variables:", paste(colnames(env_vars_mantel), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Samples with complete environmental data:", nrow(env_vars_mantel), "\n")

# Match community and metadata to complete environmental data
env_samples <- rownames(env_vars_mantel)
community_complete <- community_4th_root[env_samples, ]
metadata_complete <- metadata_2mm[env_samples, ]

cat("Final dataset dimensions:", nrow(community_complete), "samples x", ncol(community_complete), "orders\n")

# Check correlations between environmental variables
env_cor <- cor(env_vars_mantel)
cat("\n=== ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE CORRELATIONS ===\n")
print(round(env_cor, 3))

# Flag high correlations
high_cor_pairs <- which(abs(env_cor) > 0.7 & env_cor != 1, arr.ind = TRUE)
if (nrow(high_cor_pairs) > 0) {
  cat("️ High correlations detected between some variables\n")
  for (i in 1:nrow(high_cor_pairs)) {
    var1 <- rownames(env_cor)[high_cor_pairs[i,1]]
    var2 <- colnames(env_cor)[high_cor_pairs[i,2]]
    cat(sprintf("  %s vs %s: r = %.3f\n", var1, var2, env_cor[high_cor_pairs[i,1], high_cor_pairs[i,2]]))
  }
} else {
  cat("✓ All correlations below 0.7\n")
}

# Standardize environmental variables for distance calculations
env_scaled <- scale(env_vars_mantel)
cat("✓ Environmental variables standardized\n")
#=============================================================
cat("\n=== DISTANCE MATRIX CALCULATIONS ===\n")

# 1. Community dissimilarity matrix (Bray-Curtis from 4th root transformed data)
community_dist <- vegdist(community_complete, method = "bray")
cat("✓ Community distance matrix calculated (Bray-Curtis from 4th root data)\n")

# 2. Geographic distance matrix using marmap (following metabarcoding approach)
cat("Calculating geographic distances using marmap least-cost approach...\n")

# Check for missing geographic coordinates
if (any(is.na(metadata_complete[, c("latitude", "longitude")]))) {
  cat("⚠️ Missing geographic coordinates detected\n")
  complete_geo <- complete.cases(metadata_complete[, c("latitude", "longitude")])
  metadata_complete <- metadata_complete[complete_geo, ]
  env_scaled <- env_scaled[complete_geo, ]
  community_complete <- community_complete[complete_geo, ]
  community_dist <- vegdist(community_complete, method = "bray")
  cat("Updated sample size:", nrow(community_complete), "\n")
}

# Create coordinate sites dataframe for motile 2mm data
coord_sites_2mm <- metadata_complete[, c("longitude", "latitude")]
coord_sites_2mm$depth <- metadata_complete$depth

cat("Coordinate sites for motile 2mm:\n")
cat("Samples:", nrow(coord_sites_2mm), "\n")
cat("Longitude range:", round(range(coord_sites_2mm$longitude), 3), "\n")
cat("Latitude range:", round(range(coord_sites_2mm$latitude), 3), "\n")

# Load marmap library
if (!requireNamespace("marmap", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("marmap package required but not installed. Please install with: install.packages('marmap')")
}
library(marmap)

# Load bathymetric data (same region as metabarcoding analysis)
cat("Loading NOAA bathymetric data...\n")
bathydata_2mm <- getNOAA.bathy(lon1 = -95, lon2 = -90, lat1 = 27, lat2 = 30, resolution = 0.2)

# Create transition matrix based on bathymetric data, constrained by minimum depth
cat("Creating transition matrix...\n")
t_2mm <- trans.mat(bathydata_2mm, min.depth = -0.1)

# Prepare site coordinates for least-cost distance calculation
xy_sites_2mm <- as.data.frame(coord_sites_2mm[, c("longitude", "latitude")])

# Calculate least-cost distance matrix in kilometers
cat("Calculating least-cost distances...\n")
leastDist.km_2mm <- lc.dist(t_2mm, xy_sites_2mm, res = "dist")

# Convert to standard distance object for further analysis
geographic_dist_2mm <- leastDist.km_2mm
geographic_dist <- geographic_dist_2mm

# Calculate minimum observed distance
min_dist_2mm <- min(leastDist.km_2mm)
cat("✓ Geographic distance matrix calculated using marmap least-cost approach\n")
cat("Minimum distance between sites:", round(min_dist_2mm, 2), "km\n")

# Save the distance matrix for later use
output_dir_geo <- "./Output_2mm"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir_geo)) dir.create(output_dir_geo)

save(leastDist.km_2mm, file = file.path(output_dir_geo, 'leastDist.km_2mm.Rdata'))

# Convert to matrix and dataframe for export
leastDist.km_2mm_matrix <- as.matrix(leastDist.km_2mm)
leastDist.km_2mm_df <- as.data.frame(leastDist.km_2mm_matrix)
write.csv(leastDist.km_2mm_df, file = file.path(output_dir_geo, "leastDist_km_2mm.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

cat("✓ Geographic distance data saved as leastDist.km_2mm.Rdata and leastDist_km_2mm.csv\n")

# 3. Environmental distance matrix (Euclidean distance from scaled variables)
environmental_dist <- dist(env_scaled, method = "euclidean")
cat("✓ Environmental distance matrix calculated\n")

# LOG TRANSFORMATION OF DISTANCE MATRICES

cat("\n=== LOG TRANSFORMATION OF DISTANCE MATRICES ===\n")

# Check for zero distances (which would cause issues with log transformation)
zero_geo <- sum(geographic_dist == 0)
zero_env <- sum(environmental_dist == 0)

cat("Zero distances detected:\n")
cat("  Geographic:", zero_geo, "\n")
cat("  Environmental:", zero_env, "\n")

# Use log1p transformation (log(1+x)) to handle zeros
log_geographic_dist <- as.dist(log1p(as.matrix(geographic_dist)))
log_environmental_dist <- as.dist(log1p(as.matrix(environmental_dist)))

cat("✓ Log-transformed distance matrices created using log1p\n")

# Summary of all distance matrices
cat("\nDistance matrix summary:\n")
cat("- Community dissimilarity (Bray-Curtis): range", round(range(community_dist), 3), "\n")
cat("- Geographic distance: range", round(range(geographic_dist), 3), "\n") 
cat("- Environmental distance: range", round(range(environmental_dist), 3), "\n")
cat("- Log geographic distance: range", round(range(log_geographic_dist), 3), "\n")
cat("- Log environmental distance: range", round(range(log_environmental_dist), 3), "\n")

```


Mantel Tests
```{r Mantel Tests}
# 1. Environmental Mantel Test
mantel_env_motile <- vegan::mantel(community_dist, log_environmental_dist, 
                                  method = "pearson", permutations = 9999)

cat("Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Mantel statistic (r): %.3f\n", mantel_env_motile$statistic))
cat(sprintf("  p-value: %.3f\n", mantel_env_motile$signif))

if (mantel_env_motile$signif < 0.05) {
  cat("  → SIGNIFICANT environmental-community relationship\n")
} else {
  cat("  → NO significant environmental-community relationship\n")
}

# 2. Geographic Mantel Test (Distance-Decay)
cat("\n2. GEOGRAPHIC MANTEL TEST (Distance-Decay)\n")
cat("Community dissimilarity ~ Log(Geographic distance)\n")

mantel_geo_motile <- vegan::mantel(community_dist, log_geographic_dist, 
                                  method = "pearson", permutations = 9999)

cat("Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Mantel statistic (r): %.3f\n", mantel_geo_motile$statistic))
cat(sprintf("  p-value: %.3f\n", mantel_geo_motile$signif))

if (mantel_geo_motile$signif < 0.05) {
  if (mantel_geo_motile$statistic > 0) {
    cat("  → SIGNIFICANT POSITIVE distance-decay: Community similarity decreases with distance\n")
  } else {
    cat("  → SIGNIFICANT NEGATIVE relationship: Community similarity increases with distance\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("  → NO significant distance-decay relationship\n")
}
```


Partial Mantel Tests
```{r Partial Mantel Tests}
# 1. Partial Mantel: Environment controlling for Geography
cat("\n1. PARTIAL MANTEL TEST: ENVIRONMENT | GEOGRAPHY\n")
cat("Community dissimilarity ~ Log(Environmental distance) | Log(Geographic distance)\n")

partial_mantel_env_geo_motile <- vegan::mantel.partial(community_dist, log_environmental_dist, log_geographic_dist,
                                                      method = "pearson", permutations = 9999)

cat("Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Partial Mantel statistic (r): %.3f\n", partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$statistic))
cat(sprintf("  p-value: %.3f\n", partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$signif))

if (partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$signif < 0.05) {
  cat("  → SIGNIFICANT environmental effects beyond geography\n")
  cat("  → Environmental filtering operates independently of spatial processes\n")
} else {
  cat("  → NO environmental effects beyond geography\n")
  cat("  → Environmental patterns may be confounded with spatial structure\n")
}

# 2. Partial Mantel: Geography controlling for Environment
cat("\n2. PARTIAL MANTEL TEST: GEOGRAPHY | ENVIRONMENT\n")
cat("Community dissimilarity ~ Log(Geographic distance) | Log(Environmental distance)\n")

partial_mantel_geo_env_motile <- vegan::mantel.partial(community_dist, log_geographic_dist, log_environmental_dist,
                                                      method = "pearson", permutations = 9999)

cat("Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Partial Mantel statistic (r): %.3f\n", partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$statistic))
cat(sprintf("  p-value: %.3f\n", partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$signif))

if (partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$signif < 0.05) {
  if (partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$statistic > 0) {
    cat("  → SIGNIFICANT residual distance-decay: Geography matters beyond environment\n")
    cat("  → Suggests dispersal limitation or unmeasured spatial processes\n")
  } else {
    cat("  → SIGNIFICANT negative residual relationship\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("  → NO residual distance-decay after controlling for environment\n")
  cat("  → Geographic patterns fully explained by environmental gradients\n")
  cat("  → Supports environmental filtering over dispersal limitation\n")
}
```


MRM Analysis
```{r MRM}
cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("MULTIPLE REGRESSION ON DISTANCE MATRICES (MRM)\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse = ""), "\n")

# Prepare data for MRM
# Convert distance matrices to vectors
bc_dist_vec <- as.vector(community_dist)
env_dist_vec <- as.vector(log_environmental_dist)
geo_dist_vec <- as.vector(log_geographic_dist)

# Create matched dataframe
mrm_data_motile <- data.frame(
  bc_dist = bc_dist_vec,
  log_env_dist = env_dist_vec,
  log_geo_dist = geo_dist_vec
)

cat("MRM data prepared: ", nrow(mrm_data_motile), " pairwise comparisons\n")

# Run MRM analysis
cat("Running MRM with environmental and geographic predictors...\n")
mrm_result_motile <- ecodist::MRM(mrm_data_motile$bc_dist ~ mrm_data_motile$log_env_dist + mrm_data_motile$log_geo_dist, 
                                 nperm = 9999)

# Display MRM results
cat("\n=== MRM RESULTS FOR MOTILE 2MM ORDERS ===\n")
print(mrm_result_motile)

# Extract key results
env_coef <- mrm_result_motile$coef[2,1]
geo_coef <- mrm_result_motile$coef[3,1]
env_p <- mrm_result_motile$coef[2,2]
geo_p <- mrm_result_motile$coef[3,2]
model_r2 <- mrm_result_motile$r.squared[1]
model_p <- mrm_result_motile$r.squared[2]

cat("\nKey Findings:\n")
cat(sprintf("Model R²: %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", model_r2, model_p))
cat(sprintf("Environmental coefficient: %.3f (p = %.3f) %s\n", 
            env_coef, env_p, ifelse(env_p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
cat(sprintf("Geographic coefficient: %.3f (p = %.3f) %s\n", 
            geo_coef, geo_p, ifelse(geo_p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))

```

# Extract Results
```{r}
# Mantel results
mantel_results_motile <- data.frame(
  Dataset = c("Motile_2mm", "Motile_2mm"),
  Distance_Type = c("Environmental", "Geographic"),
  Mantel_r = c(mantel_env_motile$statistic, mantel_geo_motile$statistic),
  P_value = c(mantel_env_motile$signif, mantel_geo_motile$signif),
  Significance = c(
    ifelse(mantel_env_motile$signif < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(mantel_env_motile$signif < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(mantel_env_motile$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns"))),
    ifelse(mantel_geo_motile$signif < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(mantel_geo_motile$signif < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(mantel_geo_motile$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Partial Mantel results
partial_mantel_results_motile <- data.frame(
  Dataset = c("Motile_2mm", "Motile_2mm"),
  Test_Variable = c("Environmental_controlling_Geographic", "Geographic_controlling_Environmental"),
  Partial_Mantel_r = c(partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$statistic, partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$statistic),
  P_value = c(partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$signif, partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$signif),
  Significance = c(
    ifelse(partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$signif < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$signif < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns"))),
    ifelse(partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$signif < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$signif < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$signif < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# MRM results
mrm_results_motile <- data.frame(
  Dataset = c("Motile_2mm", "Motile_2mm"),
  Variable = c("Environmental_Distance", "Geographic_Distance"),
  Beta_Coefficient = c(env_coef, geo_coef),
  P_value = c(env_p, geo_p),
  Model_R2 = c(model_r2, model_r2),
  Model_P_value = c(model_p, model_p),
  Significance = c(
    ifelse(env_p < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(env_p < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(env_p < 0.05, "*", "ns"))),
    ifelse(geo_p < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(geo_p < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(geo_p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Export results
output_dir <- "./Output_2mm"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir)

write.csv(mantel_results_motile, file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_Mantel_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(partial_mantel_results_motile, file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_Partial_Mantel_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(mrm_results_motile, file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_MRM_Results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

cat("✓ Results exported to Output_2mm directory\n")
```

# Create Data Visualize
```{r}
# Prepare visualization data
viz_data_motile <- data.frame(
  BC_Distance = bc_dist_vec,
  Env_Distance = env_dist_vec,
  Geo_Distance = geo_dist_vec,
  Dataset = "Motile 2mm"
)

# 1. Environmental effects plot
p1 <- ggplot(viz_data_motile, aes(x = Env_Distance, y = BC_Distance)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "#F68C30") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#F68C30", fill = "#F68C30") +
  labs(x = "Environmental Distance (log-transformed)",
       y = "Community Dissimilarity (Bray-Curtis)",
       title = "Motile 2mm Orders: Environmental Filtering",
       subtitle = paste0("Mantel r = ", round(mantel_env_motile$statistic, 3), 
                        ", p = ", round(mantel_env_motile$signif, 3))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10))

# 2. Geographic effects plot
p2 <- ggplot(viz_data_motile, aes(x = Geo_Distance, y = BC_Distance)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "#F68C30") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#F68C30", fill = "#F68C30") +
  labs(x = "Geographic Distance (log-transformed km)",
       y = "Community Dissimilarity (Bray-Curtis)",
       title = "Motile 2mm Orders: Dispersal Limitation", 
       subtitle = paste0("Mantel r = ", round(mantel_geo_motile$statistic, 3),
                        ", p = ", round(mantel_geo_motile$signif, 3))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10))

# 3. MRM coefficients plot
effect_sizes_motile <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("Environmental", "Geographic"),
  Coefficient = c(env_coef, geo_coef),
  P_value = c(env_p, geo_p),
  Significance = c(
    ifelse(env_p < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(env_p < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(env_p < 0.05, "*", "ns"))),
    ifelse(geo_p < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(geo_p < 0.01, "**",
                  ifelse(geo_p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  )
)

p3 <- ggplot(effect_sizes_motile, aes(x = Variable, y = Coefficient, fill = Variable)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Significance), 
            vjust = ifelse(effect_sizes_motile$Coefficient >= 0, -0.5, 1.2), 
            size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(x = "Distance Type",
       y = "Standardized Coefficient (β)",
       title = "Motile 2mm Orders: MRM Effect Sizes",
       subtitle = paste0("Model R² = ", round(model_r2, 3), ", p = ", round(model_p, 3))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Environmental" = "#408BA8", "Geographic" = "#812A5A")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.7)

# 4. Summary comparison plot
summary_data <- data.frame(
  Test = c("Environmental\nMantel", "Geographic\nMantel", "Partial Env\n(|Geography)", "Partial Geo\n(|Environment)"),
  Correlation = c(mantel_env_motile$statistic, mantel_geo_motile$statistic,
                  partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$statistic, partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$statistic),
  P_value = c(mantel_env_motile$signif, mantel_geo_motile$signif,
              partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$signif, partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$signif),
  Significant = factor(c(mantel_env_motile$signif < 0.05, mantel_geo_motile$signif < 0.05,
                        partial_mantel_env_geo_motile$signif < 0.05, partial_mantel_geo_env_motile$signif < 0.05))
)

p4 <- ggplot(summary_data, aes(x = reorder(Test, abs(Correlation)), y = Correlation, fill = Significant)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("p=", round(P_value, 3))), 
            hjust = ifelse(summary_data$Correlation >= 0, -0.1, 1.1), 
            size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Analysis Type",
       y = "Correlation Coefficient",
       title = "Motile 2mm Orders: Analysis Summary",
       fill = "Significant\n(p < 0.05)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#408BA8", "FALSE" = "grey70"))

# Combine plots
combined_plot_motile <- grid.arrange(p1, p2, p3, p4, 
                                    layout_matrix = rbind(c(1,2), c(3,4)))

# Save plots
ggsave(file.path("./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_Distance_Relationships.pdf"), combined_plot_motile, 
       width = 16, height = 11, dpi = 300)

cat("✓ Visualizations saved to Output_2mm directory\n")
```


# ---------------- SIMPER ---------------------
# Motile 2mm SIMPER Analysis - Adapted from CoralNet Framework
```{r}

#----------- SIMPER ANALYSES WITH 4TH ROOT TRANSFORMED DATA -----------------------

# Create output directory for motile results
output_dir <- "./Output_2mm/Motile_2mm_SIMPER_Results_4thRoot"
if(!dir.exists("./Output_2mm")) {
  dir.create("./Output_2mm")
}
if(!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
  cat("Created output directory:", output_dir, "\n")
}

# =============  PREPARE MOTILE 2MM DATA ====================

# Use 4th root transformed order counts (same as PCoA and PERMANOVA)
motile_4th_root <- order_counts^(1/4)

# Match samples between community and metadata
common_samples <- intersect(rownames(motile_4th_root), rownames(metadata_2mm))
community_4th_root_motile <- motile_4th_root[common_samples, ]
metadata_2mm_motile <- metadata_2mm[common_samples, ]

cat("=== MOTILE 2MM SIMPER DATA SETUP ===\n")
cat("Community data:", nrow(community_4th_root_motile), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root_motile), "orders\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_4th_root_motile), rownames(metadata_2mm_motile)), "\n")

# FUNCTION DEFINITIONS (same as CoralNet)

# Function to create environmental groups using k-means clustering
create_environmental_groups <- function(env_data, community_data, variable_name, 
                                      method = "kmeans", n_groups = 2) {
  
  env_variable <- env_data[[variable_name]]
  
  if(is.null(env_variable)) {
    stop(paste("Variable", variable_name, "not found in environmental data"))
  }
  
  complete_cases <- !is.na(env_variable)
  env_clean <- env_variable[complete_cases]
  community_clean <- community_data[complete_cases, ]
  
  cat("Creating", n_groups, "groups for:", variable_name, "\n")
  cat("Range:", round(min(env_clean), 3), "to", round(max(env_clean), 3), "\n")
  
  if(method == "kmeans") {
    k_result <- kmeans(env_clean, centers = n_groups, nstart = 25)
    
    # Fix label assignment based on actual environmental values
    cluster_means <- tapply(env_clean, k_result$cluster, mean)
    cluster_order <- order(cluster_means)  # Order by actual environmental values
    
    if(n_groups == 2) {
      group_labels <- c("Low", "High")
    } else if(n_groups == 3) {
      group_labels <- c("Low", "Medium", "High")
    } else {
      group_labels <- paste0("Group_", 1:n_groups)
    }
    
    # Create a mapping from old cluster numbers to new labels
    cluster_to_label <- group_labels[rank(cluster_means)]
    groups <- factor(cluster_to_label[k_result$cluster])
    
    # Calculate group statistics with correct labels
    group_stats <- data.frame(
      Group = group_labels,
      Count = as.numeric(table(groups)[group_labels]),
      Mean = round(tapply(env_clean, groups, mean)[group_labels], 3),
      Range_Min = round(tapply(env_clean, groups, min)[group_labels], 3),
      Range_Max = round(tapply(env_clean, groups, max)[group_labels], 3)
    )
  }
  
  cat("\nGroup Summary:\n")
  print(group_stats)
  
  # Return full-length vector (with NAs for excluded cases)
  full_groups <- rep(NA, length(env_variable))
  full_groups[complete_cases] <- as.character(groups)
  full_groups <- factor(full_groups)
  
  return(list(
    groups = full_groups,
    statistics = group_stats,
    method = method,
    variable = variable_name,
    complete_cases = complete_cases
  ))
}

# Function to run SIMPER analyses with sample size checking
run_simper_analyses <- function(community_data, group_list, min_group_size = 3) {
  
  simper_results <- list()
  
  for(group_name in names(group_list)) {
    groups <- group_list[[group_name]]
    
    group_counts <- table(groups, useNA = "no")
    if(length(group_counts) < 2 || min(group_counts) < min_group_size) {
      cat("Skipping", group_name, "- insufficient sample sizes\n")
      next
    }
    
    cat("Running SIMPER for:", group_name, "\n")
    cat("Groups:", paste(names(group_counts), collapse = ", "), "\n")
    cat("Sample sizes:", paste(group_counts, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
    
    complete_cases <- !is.na(groups)
    community_subset <- community_data[complete_cases, ]
    groups_subset <- groups[complete_cases]
    
    simper_result <- simper(community_subset, groups_subset)
    simper_results[[group_name]] <- simper_result
  }
  
  return(simper_results)
}

# Function to extract SIMPER results for 2-group comparisons
extract_simper_summary <- function(simper_result, comparison_name, top_n = 10) {
  simper_summary <- summary(simper_result)
  comparison_data <- simper_summary[[1]]
  top_taxa <- head(comparison_data, top_n)
  
  data.frame(
    Comparison = rep(comparison_name, nrow(top_taxa)),
    Taxon = rownames(top_taxa),
    Average_Contribution = round(top_taxa$average, 4),
    Cumulative_Contribution = round(top_taxa$cumsum, 3),
    P_value = top_taxa$p,
    Significance = case_when(
      top_taxa$p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      top_taxa$p < 0.01 ~ "**",
      top_taxa$p < 0.05 ~ "*",
      top_taxa$p < 0.1 ~ ".",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Function to extract 3-category SIMPER results (all pairwise comparisons)
extract_3category_simper <- function(simper_result, variable_name, top_n = 10) {
  simper_summary <- summary(simper_result)
  
  all_comparisons <- list()
  
  for(comp_name in names(simper_summary)) {
    comparison_data <- simper_summary[[comp_name]]
    top_taxa <- head(comparison_data, top_n)
    
    comparison_df <- data.frame(
      Variable = variable_name,
      Comparison = comp_name,
      Taxon = rownames(top_taxa),
      Average_Contribution = round(top_taxa$average, 4),
      Cumulative_Contribution = round(top_taxa$cumsum, 3),
      P_value = top_taxa$p,
      Group_A_Mean = round(top_taxa$ava, 4),
      Group_B_Mean = round(top_taxa$avb, 4),
      Significance = case_when(
        top_taxa$p < 0.001 ~ "***",
        top_taxa$p < 0.01 ~ "**",
        top_taxa$p < 0.05 ~ "*",
        top_taxa$p < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    all_comparisons[[comp_name]] <- comparison_df
  }
  
  # Combine all comparisons
  combined_results <- do.call(rbind, all_comparisons)
  return(combined_results)
}

# Function to apply FDR correction
apply_fdr_correction <- function(simper_summary_df) {
  corrected_results <- simper_summary_df %>%
    group_by(Comparison) %>%
    mutate(
      P_value_FDR = p.adjust(P_value, method = "fdr"),
      Significance_FDR = case_when(
        P_value_FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
        P_value_FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
        P_value_FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
        P_value_FDR < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  return(corrected_results)
}

cat("✓ SIMPER functions loaded and output directory created\n")

# ============ CREATE ENVIRONMENTAL GROUPS FOR TURBIDITY AND DEPTH ============

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("CREATING ENVIRONMENTAL GROUPS WITH MOTILE 2MM DATA (4th Root Transformed)\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Variables to analyze (focusing on turbidity and depth)
variables <- c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank")
env_groups <- list()

# Create binary and 3-category groups for each variable
for(var in variables) {
  cat("\n", rep("-", 40), "\n")
  cat("PROCESSING VARIABLE:", toupper(var), "\n")
  cat(rep("-", 40), "\n")
  
  # Binary groups
  cat("\nCreating BINARY groups:\n")
  binary_result <- create_environmental_groups(metadata_2mm_motile, community_4th_root_motile, var, 
                                              method = "kmeans", n_groups = 2)
  env_groups[[paste0(var, "_binary")]] <- binary_result$groups
  
  # 3-category groups  
  cat("\nCreating 3-CATEGORY groups:\n")
  tertiary_result <- create_environmental_groups(metadata_2mm_motile, community_4th_root_motile, var,
                                                method = "kmeans", n_groups = 3)
  env_groups[[paste0(var, "_tertiary")]] <- tertiary_result$groups
}

# Verify the turbidity groups are correctly assigned
cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("VERIFYING TURBIDITY GROUP ASSIGNMENTS FOR MOTILE 2MM DATA\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

turbidity_verification <- metadata_2mm_motile %>%
  mutate(Group = env_groups$turbidity_std_rank_tertiary) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    Count = n(),
    Mean_Turbidity = round(mean(turbidity_std_rank, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Min_Turbidity = round(min(turbidity_std_rank, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Max_Turbidity = round(max(turbidity_std_rank, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

cat("Motile 2mm turbidity group assignments:\n")
print(turbidity_verification)
cat("✓ Low = Clear water, Medium = Intermediate, High = Turbid water\n")

# Verify depth groups
depth_verification <- metadata_2mm_motile %>%
  mutate(Group = env_groups$depth_tertiary) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    Count = n(),
    Mean_Depth = round(mean(depth, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Min_Depth = round(min(depth, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Max_Depth = round(max(depth, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

cat("\nMotile 2mm depth group assignments:\n")
print(depth_verification)

cat("\n✓ Environmental groups created successfully for motile 2mm data\n")

# ===========  RUN SIMPER ANALYSES ====================

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("RUNNING SIMPER ANALYSES ON MOTILE 2MM ORDER DATA\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

cat("Running SIMPER on 4th root transformed motile order data...\n")
cat("Community data dimensions:", nrow(community_4th_root_motile), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root_motile), "orders\n\n")

simper_results <- run_simper_analyses(community_4th_root_motile, env_groups)

cat("✓ SIMPER analyses completed for motile 2mm data\n")
cat("Results available for:", paste(names(simper_results), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# ============== EXTRACT AND ANALYZE RESULTS =====================

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("EXTRACTING MOTILE 2MM SIMPER RESULTS\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Extract binary comparison results
if("turbidity_std_rank_binary" %in% names(simper_results)) {
  turbidity_binary <- extract_simper_summary(simper_results$turbidity_std_rank_binary, "Turbidity_Binary")
  cat("✓ Turbidity binary results extracted\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠️ Turbidity binary analysis not available\n")
  turbidity_binary <- data.frame()
}

if("depth_binary" %in% names(simper_results)) {
  depth_binary <- extract_simper_summary(simper_results$depth_binary, "Depth_Binary")
  cat("✓ Depth binary results extracted\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠️ Depth binary analysis not available\n")
  depth_binary <- data.frame()
}

# Extract 3-category results
if("turbidity_std_rank_tertiary" %in% names(simper_results)) {
  cat("\nExtracting 3-category turbidity results...\n")
  turbidity_3cat <- extract_3category_simper(simper_results$turbidity_std_rank_tertiary, "Turbidity_3Category")
  cat("✓ Turbidity 3-category results extracted\n")
  
  cat("Available comparisons:\n")
  print(unique(turbidity_3cat$Comparison))
} else {
  cat("⚠️ Turbidity 3-category analysis not available\n")
  turbidity_3cat <- data.frame()
}

if("depth_tertiary" %in% names(simper_results)) {
  cat("\nExtracting 3-category depth results...\n")
  depth_3cat <- extract_3category_simper(simper_results$depth_tertiary, "Depth_3Category")
  cat("✓ Depth 3-category results extracted\n")
  
  cat("Available comparisons:\n")
  print(unique(depth_3cat$Comparison))
} else {
  cat("⚠️ Depth 3-category analysis not available\n")
  depth_3cat <- data.frame()
}

# ============ APPLY FDR CORRECTION FOR MULTIPLE TESTING ================

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("APPLYING FDR CORRECTION FOR MULTIPLE TESTING\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Apply FDR correction to all results
if(nrow(turbidity_binary) > 0) {
  turbidity_binary_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(turbidity_binary)
  cat("✓ FDR correction applied to turbidity binary results\n")
} else {
  turbidity_binary_fdr <- data.frame()
}

if(nrow(depth_binary) > 0) {
  depth_binary_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(depth_binary)
  cat("✓ FDR correction applied to depth binary results\n")
} else {
  depth_binary_fdr <- data.frame()
}

if(nrow(turbidity_3cat) > 0) {
  turbidity_3cat_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(turbidity_3cat)
  cat("✓ FDR correction applied to turbidity 3-category results\n")
} else {
  turbidity_3cat_fdr <- data.frame()
}

if(nrow(depth_3cat) > 0) {
  depth_3cat_fdr <- apply_fdr_correction(depth_3cat)
  cat("✓ FDR correction applied to depth 3-category results\n")
} else {
  depth_3cat_fdr <- data.frame()
}

# ============  EXPORT RESULTS ========================

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("EXPORTING MOTILE 2MM RESULTS\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Export turbidity results
if(nrow(turbidity_binary) > 0) {
  write.csv(turbidity_binary, file.path("./Output_2mm/01_Motile_2mm_Turbidity_Binary_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(turbidity_binary_fdr, file.path("./Output_2mm/01_Motile_2mm_Turbidity_Binary_Results_FDR_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Turbidity binary results exported\n")
}

if(nrow(turbidity_3cat) > 0) {
  write.csv(turbidity_3cat, file.path("./Output_2mm/02_Motile_2mm_Turbidity_3Category_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(turbidity_3cat_fdr, file.path("./Output_2mm/02_Motile_2mm_Turbidity_3Category_Results_FDR_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Turbidity 3-category results exported\n")
}

# Export depth results
if(nrow(depth_binary) > 0) {
  write.csv(depth_binary, file.path("./Output_2mm/03_Motile_2mm_Depth_Binary_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(depth_binary_fdr, file.path("./Output_2mm/03_Motile_2mm_Depth_Binary_Results_FDR_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Depth binary results exported\n")
}

if(nrow(depth_3cat) > 0) {
  write.csv(depth_3cat, file.path("./Output_2mm/04_Motile_2mm_Depth_3Category_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(depth_3cat_fdr, file.path("./Output_2mm/04_Motile_2mm_Depth_3Category_Results_FDR_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Depth 3-category results exported\n")
}

# Export group assignments for supplementary data
group_assignments <- data.frame(
  ARMS_ID = rownames(community_4th_root_motile),
  Turbidity_Binary = env_groups$turbidity_std_rank_binary,
  Turbidity_3Category = env_groups$turbidity_std_rank_tertiary,
  Depth_Binary = env_groups$depth_binary,
  Depth_3Category = env_groups$depth_tertiary,
  Depth_Value = metadata_2mm_motile$depth,
  Turbidity_Value = metadata_2mm_motile$turbidity_std_rank
)
write.csv(group_assignments, file.path("./Output_2mm/05_Motile_2mm_Sample_Group_Assignments_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
cat("✓ Group assignments exported\n")

# Create manuscript-ready summary (focusing on turbidity - strongest effect)
if(nrow(turbidity_3cat_fdr) > 0) {
  # Focus on Low vs High comparison (most extreme contrast)
  manuscript_ready <- turbidity_3cat_fdr %>%
    filter(P_value_FDR < 0.1) %>%  # Include marginally significant results
    filter(Comparison %in% c("Low_High", "High_Low")) %>%  # Most extreme contrast
    dplyr::arrange(P_value_FDR) %>%
    dplyr::select(Comparison, Taxon, Average_Contribution, P_value, P_value_FDR, Significance_FDR, 
           Group_A_Mean, Group_B_Mean) %>%
    rename(
      Group_A_Mean_Abundance = Group_A_Mean,
      Group_B_Mean_Abundance = Group_B_Mean
    )
  
  write.csv(manuscript_ready, file.path("./Output_2mm/06_Motile_2mm_Manuscript_Key_Results_4thRoot.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Manuscript-ready results exported\n")
}

# ============ DISPLAY KEY FINDINGS FOR MOTILE 2MM ORDERS ==================

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("MOTILE 2MM ORDER SIMPER FINDINGS SUMMARY\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")

# Focus on turbidity results (primary interest for comparison with sessile)
if(nrow(turbidity_3cat_fdr) > 0) {
  
  # Look for Low vs High turbidity comparison (clear vs turbid water)
  low_vs_high_turbidity <- turbidity_3cat_fdr %>%
    filter(Comparison == "Low_High" & P_value_FDR < 0.1) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P_value_FDR)
  
  cat("=== MAIN FINDING: LOW vs HIGH TURBIDITY FOR MOTILE ORDERS (4th Root Transformed) ===\n")
  cat("(Low turbidity [clear] vs High turbidity [turbid])\n\n")
  
  if(nrow(low_vs_high_turbidity) > 0) {
    cat("Significant orders after FDR correction:\n\n")
    
    for(i in 1:min(5, nrow(low_vs_high_turbidity))) {
      # Group_A_Mean = Low turbidity (clear), Group_B_Mean = High turbidity (turbid)
      clear_abundance <- low_vs_high_turbidity$Group_A_Mean[i]
      turbid_abundance <- low_vs_high_turbidity$Group_B_Mean[i]
      
      if(clear_abundance > turbid_abundance) {
        fold_change <- round(clear_abundance / turbid_abundance, 1)
        association <- "negatively associated with turbidity (prefers clear water)"
      } else {
        fold_change <- round(turbid_abundance / clear_abundance, 1)
        association <- "positively associated with turbidity (prefers turbid water)"
      }
      
      cat(sprintf("%d. %s (%s):\n", i, low_vs_high_turbidity$Taxon[i], association))
      cat(sprintf("   Clear water: %.3f abundance\n", clear_abundance))
      cat(sprintf("   Turbid water: %.3f abundance\n", turbid_abundance))
      cat(sprintf("   Fold difference: %.1fx\n", fold_change))
      cat(sprintf("   p-value (FDR): %.3f %s\n\n", 
                  low_vs_high_turbidity$P_value_FDR[i], low_vs_high_turbidity$Significance_FDR[i]))
    }
  } else {
    cat("No orders significant after FDR correction (p < 0.1)\n")
    
    # Show top orders even if not FDR significant
    top_turbidity <- turbidity_3cat_fdr %>%
      filter(Comparison == "Low_High") %>%
      arrange(P_value) %>%
      head(3)
    
    if(nrow(top_turbidity) > 0) {
      cat("\nTop orders by raw p-value:\n")
      for(i in 1:nrow(top_turbidity)) {
        cat(sprintf("%d. %s: p = %.3f (FDR p = %.3f)\n", 
                    i, top_turbidity$Taxon[i], top_turbidity$P_value[i], top_turbidity$P_value_FDR[i]))
      }
    }
  }
} else {
  cat("No turbidity 3-category results available\n")
}

# Summary for depth
if(nrow(depth_3cat_fdr) > 0) {
  depth_significant <- depth_3cat_fdr %>%
    filter(P_value_FDR < 0.1) %>%
    nrow()
  
  cat("=== DEPTH RESULTS FOR MOTILE ORDERS ===\n")
  cat(sprintf("Significant orders in depth comparisons: %d\n", depth_significant))
} else {
  cat("=== DEPTH RESULTS FOR MOTILE ORDERS ===\n")
  cat("No depth 3-category results available\n")
}

cat("\n=== FILES EXPORTED ===\n")
cat("All motile 2mm results saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("1. Turbidity binary and 3-category results for orders\n")
cat("2. Depth binary and 3-category results for orders\n") 
cat("3. Group assignments for each ARMS sample\n")
cat("4. Manuscript-ready significant results\n")
cat("   (All files available with and without FDR correction)\n")

if(exists("low_vs_high_turbidity") && nrow(low_vs_high_turbidity) > 0) {
  cat("\n=== COMPARISON WITH CORALNET SESSILE RESULTS ===\n")
  cat("MOTILE ORDERS show turbidity-mediated environmental filtering\n")
  cat("Use Low vs High turbidity comparison for sessile vs motile comparison\n")
  cat("Mobile organisms may show weaker or different turbidity responses than sessile\n")
  cat("4th root transformation allows direct comparison with CoralNet results\n")
} else {
  cat("\n=== COMPARISON WITH CORALNET SESSILE RESULTS ===\n")
  cat(" Motile orders may show weaker turbidity responses than sessile communities\n")
  cat("This supports your finding that mobile organisms have environmental independence\n")
  cat("Focus on effect sizes and biological interpretation in manuscript\n")
  cat("Behavioral responses may mask environmental filtering in mobile fauna\n")
}

cat("\n", rep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("MOTILE 2MM SIMPER ANALYSIS COMPLETE!\n")
cat("Check the", output_dir, "directory for all results files.\n")
cat("Ready for comparison with CoralNet sessile community SIMPER results!\n")
cat(rep("=", 60), "\n")
```
